general.g_text_audio: 남자: 스마트폰 사용자가 많아지면서 모바일 쇼핑 이용객이 급격히 증가한 것으로 나타났습니다. 20대가 가장 많이 이용하는 것으로 나타났으며 10대가 그 뒤를 이었습니다. 여전히 컴퓨터로 쇼핑을 하는 사람들이 많지만 앞으로 모바일 쇼핑 이용객이 더 늘 것으로 예상됩니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Số người dùng điện thoại thông minh tăng lên thì số người mua sắm trên thiết bị di động cũng tăng lên. Những người ở độ tuổi 20 sử dụng nhiều nhất, tiếp theo là người ở độ tuổi 10. Hiện tại vẫn còn nhiều người mua sắm qua máy tính nhưng dự kiến trong tương lai, số người mua sắm trên thiết bị di động sẽ tăng lên.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: It was found that the number of mobile shopping users increased rapidly as the number of smartphone users increased. People in their 20s are the most used, followed by teens. There are still many people who shop on their computers, but it is expected that mobile shopping users will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Il a été constaté que le nombre d'utilisateurs d'achats mobiles augmentait rapidement à mesure que le nombre d'utilisateurs de smartphones augmentait. Les personnes dans la vingtaine sont les plus utilisées, suivies des adolescents. Il y a encore beaucoup de gens qui achètent sur leur ordinateur, mais on s'attend à ce que les utilisateurs d'achats mobiles augmentent à l'avenir.

#######

Man: It was found that the number of mobile shopping users increased rapidly as the number of smartphone users increased. People in their 20s are the most used, followed by teens. There are still many people who shop on their computers, but it is expected that mobile shopping users will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Se descubrió que la cantidad de usuarios de compras móviles aumentó rápidamente a medida que aumentaba la cantidad de usuarios de teléfonos inteligentes. Las personas de 20 años son las más utilizadas, seguidas de los adolescentes. Todavía hay muchas personas que compran en sus computadoras, pero se espera que los usuarios de compras móviles aumenten en el futuro.

#######

Man: It was found that the number of mobile shopping users increased rapidly as the number of smartphone users increased. People in their 20s are the most used, followed by teens. There are still many people who shop on their computers, but it is expected that mobile shopping users will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Ditemukan bahwa jumlah pengguna belanja seluler meningkat pesat seiring dengan peningkatan jumlah pengguna ponsel cerdas. Orang-orang berusia 20-an adalah yang paling banyak digunakan, diikuti oleh remaja. Masih banyak orang yang berbelanja di komputernya, namun diharapkan pengguna mobile shopping kedepannya akan semakin meningkat.

#######

Man: It was found that the number of mobile shopping users increased rapidly as the number of smartphone users increased. People in their 20s are the most used, followed by teens. There are still many people who shop on their computers, but it is expected that mobile shopping users will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：スマートフォンの利用者が増えると、モバイルショッピングの利用者が急増していることがわかりました。 20 代が最も多く、10 代がそれに続く。パソコンで買い物をする人はまだまだ多いですが、今後はモバイルショッピングの利用者が増えることが予想されます。

#######

Man: It was found that the number of mobile shopping users increased rapidly as the number of smartphone users increased. People in their 20s are the most used, followed by teens. There are still many people who shop on their computers, but it is expected that mobile shopping users will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Man: Es wurde festgestellt, dass die Zahl der Mobile-Shopping-Nutzer mit der Zahl der Smartphone-Nutzer rapide zunahm. Menschen in den Zwanzigern werden am häufigsten verwendet, gefolgt von Teenagern. Es gibt immer noch viele Menschen, die auf ihren Computern einkaufen, aber es wird erwartet, dass die Nutzer mobiler Einkäufe in Zukunft zunehmen werden.

#######

Man: It was found that the number of mobile shopping users increased rapidly as the number of smartphone users increased. People in their 20s are the most used, followed by teens. There are still many people who shop on their computers, but it is expected that mobile shopping users will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：发现随着智能手机用户数量的增加，手机购物用户数量快速增长。 20多岁的人使用最多，其次是青少年。在电脑上购物的人仍然很多，但预计未来移动购物用户会增加。

#######

Man: It was found that the number of mobile shopping users increased rapidly as the number of smartphone users increased. People in their 20s are the most used, followed by teens. There are still many people who shop on their computers, but it is expected that mobile shopping users will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：發現隨著智能手機用戶數量的增加，移動購物用戶數量快速增長。 20多歲的人使用最多，其次是青少年。在電腦上購物的人仍然很多，但預計未來移動購物用戶會增加。

#######

Man: It was found that the number of mobile shopping users increased rapidly as the number of smartphone users increased. People in their 20s are the most used, followed by teens. There are still many people who shop on their computers, but it is expected that mobile shopping users will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: È stato riscontrato che il numero di utenti che effettuano acquisti da dispositivi mobili è aumentato rapidamente con l'aumento del numero di utenti di smartphone. I ventenni sono i più utilizzati, seguiti dagli adolescenti. Ci sono ancora molte persone che fanno acquisti sui loro computer, ma si prevede che gli utenti che effettuano acquisti da dispositivi mobili aumenteranno in futuro.

#######

Man: It was found that the number of mobile shopping users increased rapidly as the number of smartphone users increased. People in their 20s are the most used, followed by teens. There are still many people who shop on their computers, but it is expected that mobile shopping users will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Было обнаружено, что число пользователей мобильных покупок быстро росло по мере увеличения числа пользователей смартфонов. Чаще всего используются люди в возрасте от 20 лет, за ними следуют подростки. По-прежнему много людей, которые делают покупки на своих компьютерах, но ожидается, что в будущем количество пользователей мобильных покупок увеличится.

#######

Man: It was found that the number of mobile shopping users increased rapidly as the number of smartphone users increased. People in their 20s are the most used, followed by teens. There are still many people who shop on their computers, but it is expected that mobile shopping users will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: พบว่าจำนวนผู้ใช้ชอปปิ้งบนมือถือเพิ่มขึ้นอย่างรวดเร็วตามจำนวนผู้ใช้สมาร์ทโฟนที่เพิ่มขึ้น คนในช่วงอายุ 20 ถูกใช้มากที่สุด รองลงมาคือวัยรุ่น ยังมีผู้คนจำนวนมากที่ซื้อสินค้าผ่านคอมพิวเตอร์ แต่คาดว่าผู้ใช้ช็อปปิ้งบนมือถือจะเพิ่มขึ้นในอนาคต

#######

Man: It was found that the number of mobile shopping users increased rapidly as the number of smartphone users increased. People in their 20s are the most used, followed by teens. There are still many people who shop on their computers, but it is expected that mobile shopping users will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Descobriu-se que o número de usuários de compras móveis aumentou rapidamente à medida que o número de usuários de smartphones aumentou. Pessoas na faixa dos 20 anos são as mais utilizadas, seguidas pelos adolescentes. Ainda há muitas pessoas que fazem compras em seus computadores, mas espera-se que o número de usuários de compras móveis aumente no futuro.

#######

Man: It was found that the number of mobile shopping users increased rapidly as the number of smartphone users increased. People in their 20s are the most used, followed by teens. There are still many people who shop on their computers, but it is expected that mobile shopping users will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: यह पाया गया कि स्मार्टफोन उपयोगकर्ताओं की संख्या बढ़ने के साथ-साथ मोबाइल शॉपिंग उपयोगकर्ताओं की संख्या भी तेजी से बढ़ी। 20 वर्ष की आयु के लोग इसका सबसे अधिक उपयोग करते हैं, उसके बाद किशोर आते हैं। अभी भी बहुत से लोग हैं जो अपने कंप्यूटर पर खरीदारी करते हैं, लेकिन उम्मीद है कि भविष्य में मोबाइल शॉपिंग उपयोगकर्ताओं में वृद्धि होगी।

#######

Man: It was found that the number of mobile shopping users increased rapidly as the number of smartphone users increased. People in their 20s are the most used, followed by teens. There are still many people who shop on their computers, but it is expected that mobile shopping users will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Akıllı telefon kullanıcı sayısı arttıkça mobil alışveriş kullanıcı sayısının da hızla arttığı tespit edildi. En çok 20'li yaşlarındaki insanlar kullanılıyor, ardından gençler geliyor. Halen bilgisayarlarından alışveriş yapan çok sayıda insan var ancak gelecekte mobil alışveriş kullanıcılarının da artması bekleniyor.

#######

Man: It was found that the number of mobile shopping users increased rapidly as the number of smartphone users increased. People in their 20s are the most used, followed by teens. There are still many people who shop on their computers, but it is expected that mobile shopping users will increase in the future.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 대학생을 대상으로 대학 교육을 받으려는 목적을 조사한 결과 ‘좋은 직업을 갖기 위해’라는 응답이 가장 많았으며 ‘능력 계발’과 ‘지식 습득’이 뒤를 이었습니다. 이는 진학률은 높아졌지만 취업률은 낮아지는 현실에 대한 학생들의 고민을 반영하는 것으로 보입니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Kết quả khảo sát đối tượng sinh viên đại học về mục đích học đại học cho thấy, câu trả lời phổ biến nhất là 'kiếm được một công việc tốt', tiếp theo là 'phát triển khả năng' và 'tiếp thu kiến ​​thức'. Điều này dường như phản ánh sự lo lắng của sinh viên về thực trạng tỷ lệ học lên cao tăng nhưng tỷ lệ có việc làm lại giảm.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: As a result of a survey on the purpose of college education among college students, the most common response was 'to get a good job', followed by 'to develop the ability' and 'to gain knowledge'. This seems to reflect students' concerns about the reality that the graduation rate has risen but the employment rate has decreased.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : À la suite d'une enquête sur le but de l'enseignement collégial auprès des étudiants, la réponse la plus courante était « obtenir un bon emploi », suivi de « développer la capacité » et « acquérir des connaissances ». Cela semble refléter les préoccupations des étudiants face au fait que le taux de diplomation a augmenté mais que le taux d'emploi a diminué.

#######

Man: As a result of a survey on the purpose of college education among college students, the most common response was 'to get a good job', followed by 'to develop the ability' and 'to gain knowledge'. This seems to reflect students' concerns about the reality that the graduation rate has risen but the employment rate has decreased.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Como resultado de una encuesta sobre el propósito de la educación universitaria entre estudiantes universitarios, la respuesta más común fue 'conseguir un buen trabajo', seguida de 'desarrollar la capacidad' y 'adquirir conocimientos'. Esto parece reflejar las preocupaciones de los estudiantes sobre la realidad de que la tasa de graduación ha aumentado pero la tasa de empleo ha disminuido.

#######

Man: As a result of a survey on the purpose of college education among college students, the most common response was 'to get a good job', followed by 'to develop the ability' and 'to gain knowledge'. This seems to reflect students' concerns about the reality that the graduation rate has risen but the employment rate has decreased.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Laki-laki: Sebagai hasil survei tentang tujuan pendidikan perguruan tinggi di kalangan mahasiswa, tanggapan yang paling umum adalah 'untuk mendapatkan pekerjaan yang baik', diikuti oleh 'untuk mengembangkan kemampuan' dan 'mendapatkan pengetahuan'. Hal ini tampaknya mencerminkan kekhawatiran siswa tentang kenyataan bahwa tingkat kelulusan telah meningkat tetapi tingkat pekerjaan telah menurun.

#######

Man: As a result of a survey on the purpose of college education among college students, the most common response was 'to get a good job', followed by 'to develop the ability' and 'to gain knowledge'. This seems to reflect students' concerns about the reality that the graduation rate has risen but the employment rate has decreased.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：大学生を対象に大学教育の目的をアンケート調査した結果、「就職のため」が最も多く、次に「能力を伸ばすため」、「知識を得るため」の順でした。これは、卒業率は上がっているが就職率は下がっているという現実に対する学生の不安を反映していると思われる。

#######

Man: As a result of a survey on the purpose of college education among college students, the most common response was 'to get a good job', followed by 'to develop the ability' and 'to gain knowledge'. This seems to reflect students' concerns about the reality that the graduation rate has risen but the employment rate has decreased.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Als Ergebnis einer Umfrage unter College-Studenten zum Zweck der College-Ausbildung war die häufigste Antwort „um einen guten Job zu bekommen“, gefolgt von „um die Fähigkeit zu entwickeln“ und „um Wissen zu erwerben“. Dies scheint die Besorgnis der Studierenden darüber widerzuspiegeln, dass die Abschlussquote gestiegen, die Beschäftigungsquote jedoch zurückgegangen ist.

#######

Man: As a result of a survey on the purpose of college education among college students, the most common response was 'to get a good job', followed by 'to develop the ability' and 'to gain knowledge'. This seems to reflect students' concerns about the reality that the graduation rate has risen but the employment rate has decreased.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：对大学生接受大学教育的目的进行的一项调查显示，最普遍的回答是“找到一份好工作”，其次是“发展能力”和“获得知识”。这似乎反映了学生对毕业率上升但就业率下降的现实的担忧。

#######

Man: As a result of a survey on the purpose of college education among college students, the most common response was 'to get a good job', followed by 'to develop the ability' and 'to gain knowledge'. This seems to reflect students' concerns about the reality that the graduation rate has risen but the employment rate has decreased.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：對大學生接受大學教育的目的進行的一項調查顯示，最普遍的回答是“找到一份好工作”，其次是“發展能力”和“獲得知識”。這似乎反映了學生對畢業率上升但就業率下降的現實的擔憂。

#######

Man: As a result of a survey on the purpose of college education among college students, the most common response was 'to get a good job', followed by 'to develop the ability' and 'to gain knowledge'. This seems to reflect students' concerns about the reality that the graduation rate has risen but the employment rate has decreased.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: A seguito di un sondaggio sullo scopo dell'istruzione universitaria tra gli studenti universitari, la risposta più comune è stata "ottenere un buon lavoro", seguito da "sviluppare le capacità" e "acquisire conoscenza". Ciò sembra riflettere le preoccupazioni degli studenti riguardo al fatto che il tasso di diplomati è aumentato ma il tasso di occupazione è diminuito.

#######

Man: As a result of a survey on the purpose of college education among college students, the most common response was 'to get a good job', followed by 'to develop the ability' and 'to gain knowledge'. This seems to reflect students' concerns about the reality that the graduation rate has risen but the employment rate has decreased.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: В результате опроса студентов о целях обучения в колледже наиболее распространенным ответом было «получить хорошую работу», за которым следовали «развить способности» и «получить знания». Похоже, это отражает обеспокоенность студентов тем фактом, что количество выпускников выросло, но уровень занятости снизился.

#######

Man: As a result of a survey on the purpose of college education among college students, the most common response was 'to get a good job', followed by 'to develop the ability' and 'to gain knowledge'. This seems to reflect students' concerns about the reality that the graduation rate has risen but the employment rate has decreased.

Isto parece reflectir as preocupações dos estudantes sobre a realidade de que a taxa de graduação aumentou, mas a taxa de emprego diminuiu.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 30대 여성을 대상으로 화장품 구매 장소를 조사한 결과 화장품 전문 매장을 가장 많이 이용하는 것으로 나타났습니다. 그 다음으로는 백화점과 대형 마트가 뒤를 이었는데 백화점 이용객은 지난해에 비해서 크게 줄어든 것으로 조사되었습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Kết quả khảo sát các địa điểm mua mỹ phẩm của phụ nữ ở độ tuổi 30 cho thấy họ mua ở các cửa hàng chuyên bán mỹ phẩm nhiều nhất. Tiếp theo là trung tâm thương mại và siêu thị lớn, tuy nhiên số lượng khách sử dụng trung tâm thương mại đã giảm đáng kể so với năm ngoái.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: As a result of surveying where to buy cosmetics among women in their 30s, it was found that they use cosmetics stores the most. It was followed by department stores and large marts, but it was found that the number of customers using department stores decreased significantly compared to last year.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : À la suite d'une enquête sur les endroits où acheter des cosmétiques auprès des femmes dans la trentaine, il a été constaté qu'elles utilisent le plus les magasins de cosmétiques. Il a été suivi par les grands magasins et les grands magasins, mais il a été constaté que le nombre de clients utilisant les grands magasins a considérablement diminué par rapport à l'année dernière.

#######

Man: As a result of surveying where to buy cosmetics among women in their 30s, it was found that they use cosmetics stores the most. It was followed by department stores and large marts, but it was found that the number of customers using department stores decreased significantly compared to last year.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Como resultado de la encuesta sobre dónde comprar cosméticos entre las mujeres de 30 años, se encontró que son las que más usan las tiendas de cosméticos. Le siguieron las tiendas departamentales y los grandes mercados, pero se encontró que el número de clientes que utilizan las tiendas departamentales disminuyó significativamente en comparación con el año pasado.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 여러분, 혹시 비행기를 이용하면서 짐이 없어지거나 늦게 도착한 적이 있으십니까? 한 보고서에 따르면 2006년부터 2014년까지 비행기 수하물 사고 수는 2010년에 최고였다가 감소하고 있습니다. 사고 종류로는 짐이 늦게 도착하는 지연 사고가 가장 많았고 가방 안의 물건이 깨지는 파손 그리고 분실이 각각 그 뒤를 이었습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Các bạn đã bao giờ bị thất lạc hành lý hoặc hành lý đến muộn khi đi máy bay chưa? Theo một báo cáo, từ năm 2006 đến năm 2014, số vụ tai nạn hành lý máy bay lên đến đỉnh điểm vào năm 2010 và sau đó đang giảm dần. Loại tai nạn phổ biến nhất là hành lý đến chậm, sau đó là hư hỏng và mất đồ trong túi.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: Guys, have you ever lost your luggage or your luggage arrived late while on a plane? According to one report, from 2006 to 2014, the number of airplane baggage accidents peaked in 2010 and then is declining. The most common type of accident was delayed luggage arrival, followed by breakage and loss of items in the bag.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Les gars, avez-vous déjà perdu vos bagages ou vos bagages sont arrivés en retard dans un avion ? Selon un rapport, de 2006 à 2014, le nombre d'accidents de bagages d'avion a culminé en 2010, puis a diminué. Le type d'accident le plus courant était l'arrivée tardive des bagages, suivi de la casse et de la perte d'articles dans le sac.

#######

Man: Guys, have you ever lost your luggage or your luggage arrived late while on a plane? According to one report, from 2006 to 2014, the number of airplane baggage accidents peaked in 2010 and then is declining. Según un informe, de 2006 a 2014, la cantidad de accidentes de equipaje en aviones alcanzó su punto máximo en 2010 y luego está disminuyendo. El tipo de accidente más común fue el retraso en la llegada del equipaje, seguido de la rotura y pérdida de elementos de la maleta.

#######

Jenis kecelakaan yang paling umum adalah keterlambatan kedatangan bagasi, diikuti dengan kerusakan dan kehilangan barang di dalam tas.

#######

Man: Guys, have you ever lost your luggage or your luggage arrived late while on a plane? g_text_audio_translate.th:

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 출판 시장의 소비층이 변하고 있습니다. 지난 10년간 연령별 도서 구매율에 따르면 가장 많은 비중을 차지했던 20대의 구매율은 감소하고 40대의 경우는 높아진 것으로 나타났습니다. 분야별로는 ‘문학’이 가장 많았으며 ‘자기 계발’, ‘유아’가 그 뒤를 이었습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Tầng lớp tiêu dùng của thị trường xuất bản đang thay đổi. Theo tỷ lệ mua sách theo độ tuổi trong 10 năm qua, tỷ lệ mua sách của độ tuổi 20 chiếm tỷ trọng lớn nhất đã giảm và trường hợp của độ tuổi 40 đã tăng lên. Theo từng lĩnh vực, 'văn học' là nhiều nhất, tiếp theo là 'phát triển bản thân' và 'sách thiếu nhi'.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: The consumer base of the publishing market is changing. According to the book purchase rate by age over the past 10 years, the purchase rate of those in their 20s, which accounted for the largest portion, decreased and those in their 40s increased. By field, ‘Literature’ was the most common, followed by ‘Self-development’ and ‘Children’.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : La base de consommateurs du marché de l'édition est en train de changer. Selon le taux d'achat de livres selon l'âge au cours des 10 dernières années, le taux d'achat des personnes dans la vingtaine, qui représentaient la plus grande part, a diminué et celui des personnes dans la quarantaine a augmenté. Par domaine, « Littérature » ​​était le plus courant, suivi de « Développement personnel » et « Enfance ».

#######

Man: The consumer base of the publishing market is changing. According to the book purchase rate by age over the past 10 years, the purchase rate of those in their 20s, which accounted for the largest portion, decreased and those in their 40s increased. By field, ‘Literature’ was the most common, followed by ‘Self-development’ and ‘Children’.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: La base de consumidores del mercado editorial está cambiando. Según la tasa de compra de libros por edad en los últimos 10 años, la tasa de compra de los veinteañeros, que representan la mayor parte, disminuyó y la de los cuarenta aumentó. Por campos, 'Literatura' fue el más común, seguido de 'Autodesarrollo' e 'Infancia'.

#######

Man: The consumer base of the publishing market is changing. According to the book purchase rate by age over the past 10 years, the purchase rate of those in their 20s, which accounted for the largest portion, decreased and those in their 40s increased. By field, ‘Literature’ was the most common, followed by ‘Self-development’ and ‘Children’.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Basis konsumen dari pasar penerbitan sedang berubah. Menurut tingkat pembelian buku berdasarkan usia selama 10 tahun terakhir, tingkat pembelian mereka yang berusia 20-an, yang merupakan porsi terbesar, menurun dan mereka yang berusia 40-an meningkat. Berdasarkan bidang, 'Sastra' adalah yang paling umum, diikuti oleh 'Pengembangan Diri' dan 'Anak-anak'.

#######

Man: The consumer base of the publishing market is changing. According to the book purchase rate by age over the past 10 years, the purchase rate of those in their 20s, which accounted for the largest portion, decreased and those in their 40s increased. By field, ‘Literature’ was the most common, followed by ‘Self-development’ and ‘Children’.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：出版市場の消費者基盤が変化しています。過去10年間の年代別書籍購入率をみると、最も多い20代の購入率が低下し、40代の購入率が上昇した。分野別では「文学」が最も多く、「自己啓発」「子ども」が続いた。

#######

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 여러분은 운동을 자주 하십니까? 문화체육관광부 조사 결과에 따르면 우리 국민이 주 1회 이상 생활체육에 참여하는 비율이 2014년 이후 계속해서 증가한 것으로 나타났습니다. 가장 많이 하는 운동은 ‘걷기’였으며 그 다음은 ‘등산’, 그리고 ‘헬스’가 그 뒤를 이었습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Mọi người có thường xuyên tập thể dục không? Theo kết quả một cuộc khảo sát của Bộ Văn hóa, Thể thao và Du lịch, tỷ lệ người Hàn Quốc tham gia các môn thể thao hàng ngày ít nhất một lần một tuần đã liên tục tăng kể từ năm 2014. Môn thể thao phổ biến nhất là 'đi bộ', sau đó là 'leo núi' và 'gym'.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: Do you often exercise? According to the results of a survey by the Ministry of Culture, Sports and Tourism, the proportion of Koreans participating in daily sports at least once a week has continuously increased since 2014. The most common exercise was 'walking', followed by 'climbing' and 'gym'.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Faites-vous souvent de l'exercice ? Selon les résultats d'une enquête du ministère de la Culture, des Sports et du Tourisme, la proportion de Coréens pratiquant des sports quotidiens au moins une fois par semaine n'a cessé d'augmenter depuis 2014. L'exercice le plus courant était la "marche", suivie de "l'escalade". et "salle de sport".

#######

Man: Do you often exercise? According to the results of a survey by the Ministry of Culture, Sports and Tourism, the proportion of Koreans participating in daily sports at least once a week has continuously increased since 2014. The most common exercise was 'walking', followed by 'climbing' and 'gym'.
g_text_audio_translate.es:

Según los resultados de una encuesta realizada por el Ministerio de Cultura, Deportes y Turismo, la proporción de coreanos que participan en deportes diarios al menos una vez a la semana ha aumentado continuamente desde 2014. El ejercicio más común fue "caminar", seguido de "escalar". y 'gimnasio'.

Olahraga yang paling umum adalah 'jalan kaki', diikuti dengan 'memanjat'. dan 'olahraga'.

g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: क्या आप अक्सर व्यायाम करते हैं? संस्कृति, खेल और पर्यटन मंत्रालय के एक सर्वेक्षण के परिणामों के अनुसार, सप्ताह में कम से कम एक बार दैनिक खेलों में भाग लेने वाले कोरियाई लोगों का अनुपात 2014 से लगातार बढ़ रहा है। सबसे आम व्यायाम 'चलना' था, उसके बाद 'चढ़ना' था। और 'जिम'.

#######

Man: Do you often exercise? According to the results of a survey by the Ministry of Culture, Sports and Tourism, the proportion of Koreans participating in daily sports at least once a week has continuously increased since 2014. The most common exercise was 'walking', followed by 'climbing' and 'gym'.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:

#######

The most common exercise was 'walking', followed by 'climbing' and 'gym'.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 직장인들은 점심시간을 어떻게 보낼까요? 직장인의 점심시간은 한 시간이 70%였고, 한 시간 삼십 분은 20%, 한 시간 미만은 10%였습니다. 식사 후 활동은 ‘동료와 차 마시기’가 가장 많았으며, ‘산책하기’, ‘낮잠 자기’가 뒤를 이었습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Nhân viên văn phòng trải qua giờ nghỉ trưa như thế nào? 70% nhân viên văn phòng có một giờ nghỉ trưa, 20% là một giờ ba mươi phút và 10% là dưới một giờ. Sau bữa ăn, ‘uống trà với đồng nghiệp’ là hoạt động thường xuyên nhất, sau đó là ‘đi dạo’ và ‘ngủ trưa’.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: How do office workers spend their lunch break? For office workers' lunch time, one hour is 70%, one hour and thirty minutes is 20%, and less than an hour is 10%. After meals, ‘having tea with colleagues’ is the most frequent activity, followed by ‘taking a walk’ and ‘taking a nap’.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Comment les employés de bureau passent-ils leur pause déjeuner ? Pour l'heure du déjeuner des employés de bureau, une heure est de 70 %, une heure et trente minutes est de 20 % et moins d'une heure est de 10 %. Après les repas, « prendre le thé avec des collègues » est l'activité la plus fréquente, suivie de « faire une promenade » et « faire une sieste ».

#######

Man: How do office workers spend their lunch break? For office workers' lunch time, one hour is 70%, one hour and thirty minutes is 20%, and less than an hour is 10%. After meals, ‘having tea with colleagues’ is the most frequent activity, followed by ‘taking a walk’ and ‘taking a nap’.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Cómo pasan su hora de almuerzo los trabajadores de oficina? Para la hora del almuerzo de los trabajadores de oficina, una hora es el 70 %, una hora y treinta minutos es el 20 % y menos de una hora es el 10 %. Después de las comidas, 'tomar el té con los compañeros' es la actividad más frecuente, seguida de 'dar un paseo' y 'dormir la siesta'.

#######

Man: How do office workers spend their lunch break? For office workers' lunch time, one hour is 70%, one hour and thirty minutes is 20%, and less than an hour is 10%. After meals, ‘having tea with colleagues’ is the most frequent activity, followed by ‘taking a walk’ and ‘taking a nap’.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Bagaimana pekerja kantor menghabiskan istirahat makan siang mereka? Untuk waktu makan siang pekerja kantoran, satu jam adalah 70%, satu jam tiga puluh menit adalah 20%, dan kurang dari satu jam adalah 10%. Setelah makan, 'minum teh bersama rekan kerja' adalah aktivitas yang paling sering dilakukan, diikuti dengan 'jalan-jalan' dan 'tidur siang'.

#######

Man: How do office workers spend their lunch break? For office workers' lunch time, one hour is 70%, one hour and thirty minutes is 20%, and less than an hour is 10%. After meals, ‘having tea with colleagues’ is the most frequent activity, followed by ‘taking a walk’ and ‘taking a nap’.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：サラリーマンは昼休みをどうやって過ごすの？サラリーマンの昼休みは、1時間が7割、1時間30分が2割、1時間未満が1割。食後は「同僚とお茶をする」が最も多く、「散歩」「昼寝」が続く。

#######

Man: How do office workers spend their lunch break? For office workers' lunch time, one hour is 70%, one hour and thirty minutes is 20%, and less than an hour is 10%. After meals, ‘having tea with colleagues’ is the most frequent activity, followed by ‘taking a walk’ and ‘taking a nap’.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Wie verbringen Büroangestellte ihre Mittagspause? Für die Mittagspause von Büroangestellten beträgt eine Stunde 70 %, eine Stunde und dreißig Minuten 20 % und weniger als eine Stunde 10 %. Nach dem Essen ist „Tee mit Kollegen trinken“ die häufigste Aktivität, gefolgt von „Spazieren gehen“ und „Ein Nickerchen machen“.

#######

Man: How do office workers spend their lunch break? For office workers' lunch time, one hour is 70%, one hour and thirty minutes is 20%, and less than an hour is 10%. After meals, ‘having tea with colleagues’ is the most frequent activity, followed by ‘taking a walk’ and ‘taking a nap’.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：上班族的午休时间是怎么度过的？上班族的午餐时间，一小时占70%，一小时三十分钟占20%，不到一小时占10%。饭后，“和同事喝茶”是最频繁的活动，其次是“散步”和“打盹”。

#######

Man: How do office workers spend their lunch break? For office workers' lunch time, one hour is 70%, one hour and thirty minutes is 20%, and less than an hour is 10%. After meals, ‘having tea with colleagues’ is the most frequent activity, followed by ‘taking a walk’ and ‘taking a nap’.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：上班族的午休時間是怎麼度過的？上班族的午餐時間，一小時佔70%，一小時三十分鐘佔20%，不到一小時佔10%。飯後，“和同事喝茶”是最頻繁的活動，其次是“散步”和“打盹”。

#######

Man: How do office workers spend their lunch break? For office workers' lunch time, one hour is 70%, one hour and thirty minutes is 20%, and less than an hour is 10%. After meals, ‘having tea with colleagues’ is the most frequent activity, followed by ‘taking a walk’ and ‘taking a nap’.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Come trascorrono la pausa pranzo gli impiegati? Per l'ora di pranzo degli impiegati, un'ora è il 70%, un'ora e trenta minuti è il 20% e meno di un'ora è il 10%. Dopo i pasti, "prendere il tè con i colleghi" è l'attività più frequente, seguita da "fare una passeggiata" e "fare un pisolino".

#######

Man: How do office workers spend their lunch break? For office workers' lunch time, one hour is 70%, one hour and thirty minutes is 20%, and less than an hour is 10%. After meals, ‘having tea with colleagues’ is the most frequent activity, followed by ‘taking a walk’ and ‘taking a nap’.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Как офисные работники проводят обеденный перерыв? Для офисных работников время обеда один час составляет 70%, один час тридцать минут — 20%, а менее часа — 10%. После еды наиболее частым занятием является «пить чай с коллегами», за ним следуют «погулять» и «подремать».

#######

Man: How do office workers spend their lunch break? For office workers' lunch time, one hour is 70%, one hour and thirty minutes is 20%, and less than an hour is 10%. After meals, ‘having tea with colleagues’ is the most frequent activity, followed by ‘taking a walk’ and ‘taking a nap’.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: พนักงานออฟฟิศใช้เวลาพักกลางวันอย่างไร? สำหรับมื้อกลางวันของพนักงานออฟฟิศ หนึ่งชั่วโมงคือ 70% หนึ่งชั่วโมงสามสิบนาทีคือ 20% และน้อยกว่าหนึ่งชั่วโมงคือ 10% หลังอาหาร “การดื่มน้ำชากับเพื่อนร่วมงาน” เป็นกิจกรรมที่พบบ่อยที่สุด รองลงมาคือ “เดินเล่น” และ “งีบหลับ”

#######

Man: How do office workers spend their lunch break? For office workers' lunch time, one hour is 70%, one hour and thirty minutes is 20%, and less than an hour is 10%. After meals, ‘having tea with colleagues’ is the most frequent activity, followed by ‘taking a walk’ and ‘taking a nap’.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Como os funcionários de escritório passam o horário de almoço? Para o horário de almoço dos trabalhadores de escritório, uma hora equivale a 70%, uma hora e trinta minutos equivale a 20% e menos de uma hora equivale a 10%. Após as refeições, ‘tomar chá com os colegas’ é a atividade mais frequente, seguida de ‘dar um passeio’ e ‘tirar uma soneca’.

#######

Man: How do office workers spend their lunch break? For office workers' lunch time, one hour is 70%, one hour and thirty minutes is 20%, and less than an hour is 10%. After meals, ‘having tea with colleagues’ is the most frequent activity, followed by ‘taking a walk’ and ‘taking a nap’.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: कार्यालय कर्मचारी अपना दोपहर का भोजन अवकाश कैसे बिताते हैं? कार्यालय कर्मचारियों के दोपहर के भोजन के समय के लिए, एक घंटा 70% है, एक घंटा और तीस मिनट 20% है, और एक घंटे से कम 10% है। भोजन के बाद, 'सहकर्मियों के साथ चाय पीना' सबसे आम गतिविधि है, इसके बाद 'टहलना' और 'झपकी लेना' है।

#######

Man: How do office workers spend their lunch break? For office workers' lunch time, one hour is 70%, one hour and thirty minutes is 20%, and less than an hour is 10%. After meals, ‘having tea with colleagues’ is the most frequent activity, followed by ‘taking a walk’ and ‘taking a nap’.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Ofis çalışanları öğle yemeği molasını nasıl geçiriyor? Ofis çalışanlarının öğle yemeği zamanı için bir saat %70, bir saat otuz dakika %20, bir saatten az ise %10'dur. Yemekten sonra en sık yapılan aktivite 'meslektaşlarla çay içmek', bunu 'yürüyüşe çıkmak' ve 'şekerleme' takip ediyor.

#######

Man: How do office workers spend their lunch break? For office workers' lunch time, one hour is 70%, one hour and thirty minutes is 20%, and less than an hour is 10%. After meals, ‘having tea with colleagues’ is the most frequent activity, followed by ‘taking a walk’ and ‘taking a nap’.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 2015년 이후 영화관을 찾는 관객 수가 계속해서 감소하고 있습니다. 관객 수가 줄고 있는 이유로는 '여가 활동이 다양해져서’가 가장 많았고, 영화를 모바일로 보는 경우가 늘어서', '관람료가 올라서’ 그 뒤를 이었습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Kể từ năm 2015, số lượng người đến rạp chiếu phim liên tục giảm. Nguyên nhân khiến số lượng khán giả giảm nhiều nhất là do "các hoạt động giải trí trở nên đa dạng", sau đó là "sự gia tăng của lượng người xem phim trên thiết bị di động" và "vé xem phim tăng giá".
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: Since 2015, the number of people going to the cinema has continued to decline. The reason for the decrease in the number of audiences was 'the variety of leisure activities', followed by 'the increase in the number of people watching movies on mobile' and 'the increase in the admission fee'.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Depuis 2015, le nombre de personnes allant au cinéma ne cesse de baisser. La raison de la diminution du nombre de spectateurs était « la variété des activités de loisirs », suivie de « l'augmentation du nombre de personnes regardant des films sur mobile » et « l'augmentation du prix d'entrée ».

#######

Man: Since 2015, the number of people going to the cinema has continued to decline. The reason for the decrease in the number of audiences was 'the variety of leisure activities', followed by 'the increase in the number of people watching movies on mobile' and 'the increase in the admission fee'.

Adam: 2015'ten beri sinemaya gidenlerin sayısı azalmaya devam ediyor. İzleyici sayısındaki azalmanın nedeni olarak 'boş zaman etkinliklerinin çeşitliliği', ardından 'cepten film izleyenlerin sayısının artması' ve 'giriş ücretlerinin artması' geldi.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 우리나라 국민의 1인당 연간 쌀 소비량이 1980년 132kg이었으나 그 후 매년 감소해 2018년에는 절반가량 감소한 61kg으로 나타났습니다. 통계청이 발표한 조사에 따르면 국민 1인당 연간 쌀 소비량은 1980년대부터 매년 약 2~3kg씩 감소해 오다가 2000년대에 들어서 급속도로 감소하여 2018년에는 61kg으로 40년 만에 절반가량 줄어든 것으로 조사됐습니다. 이를 1인당 하루 소비량으로 계산하면 밥 두 공기가 채 안 되는 양이라고 합니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Mức tiêu thụ gạo bình quân đầu người hàng năm của người Hàn Quốc là 132kg vào năm 1980, nhưng đã giảm hàng năm kể từ đó và vào năm 2018, nó giảm khoảng một nửa xuống còn 61kg. Theo một cuộc khảo sát do Cục Thống kê Quốc gia công bố, mức tiêu thụ gạo bình quân đầu người hàng năm đã giảm khoảng 2-3kg mỗi năm kể từ những năm 1980, và sau đó giảm nhanh chóng vào những năm 2000, đạt 61kg vào năm 2018, giảm một nửa trong 40 năm. Nếu tính theo mức tiêu thụ hàng ngày của mỗi người thì nó ít hơn hai bát cơm.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: The annual consumption of rice per capita in Korea was 132kg in 1980, but it has declined every year since then, down about half to 61kg in 2018. According to a survey released by the National Statistical Office, annual rice consumption per person has been decreasing by about 2-3kg every year since the 1980s, but it rapidly decreased in the 2000s to 61kg in 2018, about half in 40 years. If this is calculated as daily consumption per person, it is said to be less than two bowls of rice.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Il consumo annuale di riso pro capite in Corea era di 132 kg nel 1980, ma da allora è diminuito ogni anno, scendendo di circa la metà fino a raggiungere i 61 kg nel 2018. Secondo un sondaggio pubblicato dall’Ufficio nazionale di statistica, il consumo annuale di riso pro capite è aumentato è diminuito di circa 2-3 kg ogni anno a partire dagli anni ’80, ma è rapidamente diminuito negli anni 2000 fino a raggiungere i 61 kg nel 2018, circa la metà in 40 anni. Se questo viene calcolato come consumo giornaliero per persona, si dice che sia inferiore a due ciotole di riso.

#######

Man: The annual consumption of rice per capita in Korea was 132kg in 1980, but it has declined every year since then, down about half to 61kg in 2018. According to a survey released by the National Statistical Office, annual rice consumption per person has been decreasing by about 2-3kg every year since the 1980s, but it rapidly decreased in the 2000s to 61kg in 2018, about half in 40 years. If this is calculated as daily consumption per person, it is said to be less than two bowls of rice.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : La consommation annuelle de riz par habitant en Corée était de 132 kg en 1980, mais elle a diminué chaque année depuis lors, tombant d'environ la moitié à 61 kg en 2018. Selon une enquête publiée par l'Office national des statistiques, la consommation annuelle de riz par personne a augmenté. a diminué d'environ 2 à 3 kg chaque année depuis les années 1980, mais a rapidement diminué dans les années 2000 pour atteindre 61 kg en 2018, soit environ la moitié en 40 ans. Si cela est calculé comme la consommation quotidienne par personne, on dit que cela représente moins de deux bols de riz.

#######

Man: The annual consumption of rice per capita in Korea was 132kg in 1980, but it has declined every year since then, down about half to 61kg in 2018. According to a survey released by the National Statistical Office, annual rice consumption per person has been decreasing by about 2-3kg every year since the 1980s, but it rapidly decreased in the 2000s to 61kg in 2018, about half in 40 years. If this is calculated as daily consumption per person, it is said to be less than two bowls of rice.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: El consumo anual de arroz per cápita en Corea era de 132 kg en 1980, pero ha disminuido cada año desde entonces, hasta aproximadamente la mitad, hasta 61 kg en 2018. Según una encuesta publicada por la Oficina Nacional de Estadística, el consumo anual de arroz por persona ha aumentado. ha estado disminuyendo entre 2 y 3 kg cada año desde la década de 1980, pero disminuyó rápidamente en la década de 2000 a 61 kg en 2018, aproximadamente la mitad en 40 años. Si se calcula como consumo diario por persona, se dice que es menos de dos platos de arroz.

#######

Man: The annual consumption of rice per capita in Korea was 132kg in 1980, but it has declined every year since then, down about half to 61kg in 2018. According to a survey released by the National Statistical Office, annual rice consumption per person has been decreasing by about 2-3kg every year since the 1980s, but it rapidly decreased in the 2000s to 61kg in 2018, about half in 40 years. If this is calculated as daily consumption per person, it is said to be less than two bowls of rice.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Konsumsi beras per kapita tahunan di Korea adalah 132kg pada tahun 1980, namun sejak saat itu konsumsi beras terus menurun setiap tahunnya, turun sekitar setengahnya menjadi 61kg pada tahun 2018. Menurut survei yang dirilis oleh Kantor Statistik Nasional, konsumsi beras tahunan per orang telah meningkat. telah mengalami penurunan sekitar 2-3 kg setiap tahun sejak tahun 1980an, namun penurunan tersebut terjadi dengan cepat pada tahun 2000an menjadi 61 kg pada tahun 2018, atau sekitar setengahnya dalam waktu 40 tahun. Kalau dihitung konsumsi harian per orang dikatakan kurang dari dua mangkok nasi.

#######

Man: The annual consumption of rice per capita in Korea was 132kg in 1980, but it has declined every year since then, down about half to 61kg in 2018. According to a survey released by the National Statistical Office, annual rice consumption per person has been decreasing by about 2-3kg every year since the 1980s, but it rapidly decreased in the 2000s to 61kg in 2018, about half in 40 years. If this is calculated as daily consumption per person, it is said to be less than two bowls of rice.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性：韓国の一人当たりの米の年間消費量は1980年には132kgでしたが、それ以降は年々減少し、2018年には約半分の61kgに減りました。統計庁が発表した調査によると、一人当たりの年間米消費量は年々減少しています。 1980年代から毎年2～3kgほど減少していましたが、2000年代に入ると急激に減少し、2018年には61kgと40年間で約半分に減りました。これを1人当たりの1日の摂取量に換算すると、ご飯茶碗2杯分にも満たないと言われています。

#######

Man: The annual consumption of rice per capita in Korea was 132kg in 1980, but it has declined every year since then, down about half to 61kg in 2018. According to a survey released by the National Statistical Office, annual rice consumption per person has been decreasing by about 2-3kg every year since the 1980s, but it rapidly decreased in the 2000s to 61kg in 2018, about half in 40 years. If this is calculated as daily consumption per person, it is said to be less than two bowls of rice.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Der jährliche Reisverbrauch pro Kopf in Korea betrug 1980 132 kg, ist aber seitdem jedes Jahr zurückgegangen, etwa um die Hälfte auf 61 kg im Jahr 2018. Laut einer vom Nationalen Statistikamt veröffentlichten Umfrage ist der jährliche Reisverbrauch pro Person gestiegen ist seit den 1980er Jahren jedes Jahr um etwa 2–3 kg zurückgegangen, ging jedoch in den 2000er Jahren rasch auf 61 kg im Jahr 2018 zurück, etwa die Hälfte in 40 Jahren. Rechnet man diesen als täglichen Verzehr pro Person, spricht man von weniger als zwei Schüsseln Reis.

#######

Man: The annual consumption of rice per capita in Korea was 132kg in 1980, but it has declined every year since then, down about half to 61kg in 2018. According to a survey released by the National Statistical Office, annual rice consumption per person has been decreasing by about 2-3kg every year since the 1980s, but it rapidly decreased in the 2000s to 61kg in 2018, about half in 40 years. If this is calculated as daily consumption per person, it is said to be less than two bowls of rice.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 통계청에서 발표한 2017년 소비자 물가지수입니다. 한국의 2017년 물가는 작년에 비해 1.4%가 상승하였습니다. 세계 다른 나라들은 물가변동이 얼마나 있었을까요? 중국이 2.9%로 가장 높게 나왔습니다. 일본과 독일은 각각 2.5%, 1.8%로 한국보다 물가상승률이 높습니다. 미국은 한국과 동일한 상승률을 보여 주고 있습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Đây là chỉ số vật giá tiêu dùng năm 2017 do Cục Thống kê công bố. Vật giá năm 2017 của Hàn Quốc đã tăng 1,4% so với năm ngoái. Các quốc gia khác trên thế giới biến động bao nhiêu về vật giá? Trung Quốc đạt mức cao nhất là 2,9%. Nhật Bản và Đức lần lượt đạt 2,5% và 1,8%, hai quốc gia này có tỷ lệ tăng vật giá cao hơn Hàn Quốc. Mỹ cho thấy tỷ lệ tăng tương tự như Hàn Quốc.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: This is the 2017 consumer price index announced by the National Statistical Office. In 2017, inflation in Korea increased by 1.4% compared to the previous year. How much did the rest of the world fluctuate in prices? China came out the highest at 2.9%. Japan and Germany have higher inflation rates than Korea at 2.5% and 1.8%, respectively. The US is showing the same rate of increase as Korea.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Questo è l'indice dei prezzi al consumo 2017 annunciato dall'Ufficio nazionale di statistica. Nel 2017 l’inflazione in Corea è aumentata dell’1,4% rispetto all’anno precedente. Quanto hanno oscillato i prezzi nel resto del mondo? La Cina è risultata la più alta con il 2,9%. Il Giappone e la Germania hanno tassi di inflazione più elevati rispetto alla Corea, rispettivamente al 2,5% e all’1,8%. Gli Stati Uniti stanno mostrando lo stesso tasso di crescita della Corea.

#######

How much did the rest of the world fluctuate in prices? China came out the highest at 2.9%. Japan and Germany have higher inflation rates than Korea at 2.5% and 1.8%, respectively. The US is showing the same rate of increase as Korea.

Dans quelle mesure les prix ont-ils fluctué dans le reste du monde ? La Chine arrive en tête avec 2,9 %. Le Japon et l’Allemagne ont des taux d’inflation plus élevés que la Corée, soit respectivement 2,5 % et 1,8 %. Les États-Unis affichent le même taux de croissance que la Corée.

ผู้ชาย: นี่คือดัชนีราคาผู้บริโภคปี 2560 ที่ประกาศโดยสำนักงานสถิติแห่งชาติ ในปี 2560 อัตราเงินเฟ้อในเกาหลีเพิ่มขึ้น 1.4% เมื่อเทียบกับปีที่แล้ว ส่วนที่เหลือของโลกมีความผันผวนของราคามากแค่ไหน? จีนออกมาสูงสุดที่ 2.9% ญี่ปุ่นและเยอรมนีมีอัตราเงินเฟ้อสูงกว่าเกาหลีอยู่ที่ 2.5% และ 1.8% ตามลำดับ สหรัฐฯ มีอัตราการเพิ่มขึ้นเท่ากับเกาหลี

#######

Man: This is the 2017 consumer price index announced by the National Statistical Office. In 2017, inflation in Korea increased by 1.4% compared to the previous year. How much did the rest of the world fluctuate in prices? China came out the highest at 2.9%. Japan and Germany have higher inflation rates than Korea at 2.5% and 1.8%, respectively. The US is showing the same rate of increase as Korea.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Este é o índice de preços ao consumidor de 2017 anunciado pelo Instituto Nacional de Estatística. Em 2017, a inflação na Coreia aumentou 1,4% em relação ao ano anterior. Quanto o resto do mundo flutuou nos preços? A China saiu em primeiro lugar, com 2,9%. O Japão e a Alemanha têm taxas de inflação mais elevadas do que a Coreia, de 2,5% e 1,8%, respectivamente. Os EUA apresentam a mesma taxa de aumento que a Coreia.

#######

#######

Man: This is the 2017 consumer price index announced by the National Statistical Office. In 2017, inflation in Korea increased by 1.4% compared to the previous year. Çin %2,9 ile en yüksek rakama ulaştı. Japonya ve Almanya'nın enflasyon oranları sırasıyla %2,5 ve %1,8 ile Kore'den daha yüksek. ABD, Kore ile aynı oranda artış gösteriyor.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 시청률 전문 기관 조사에 따르면 작년 대비 예능 프로와 드라마 시청률은 점점 높아지고 있는 반면 시사와 다큐 시청률은 점점 낮아지고 있습니다. 올해 평균 시청률은 예능 13%, 드라마 25%를 기록했고 시사와 다큐는 각각 10%, 6%를 기록하였습니다. 이는 경제 불황으로 사람들이 오락적인 즐거움을 더욱 선호하기 때문인 것으로 보입니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Theo một cuộc khảo sát của một tổ chức chuyên môn về tỷ lệ người xem, tỷ lệ người xem chương trình giải trí và phim truyền hình ngày càng tăng so với năm ngoái, trong khi tỷ lệ người xem thời sự và phim tài liệu ngày càng giảm. Tỷ lệ người xem bình quân của năm nay là 13% chương trình giải trí và 25% phim truyền hình, thời sự và phim tài liệu lần lượt là 10% và 6% . Điều này dường như là do suy thoái kinh tế khiến mọi người thích thú với giải trí hơn.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: According to a survey by an organization specializing in viewership ratings, viewership ratings for entertainment programs and dramas are gradually increasing compared to last year, while ratings for current affairs and documentaries are gradually declining. Average viewership this year recorded 13% for entertainment programs and 25% for dramas, and 10% and 6% for current affairs and documentaries, respectively. This seems to be because people prefer entertainment more due to the economic recession.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Secondo un sondaggio condotto da un'organizzazione specializzata in ascolti, rispetto all'anno scorso gli ascolti per i programmi di intrattenimento e le fiction sono in graduale aumento, mentre quelli per l'attualità e i documentari stanno gradualmente diminuendo. Quest'anno il numero medio di spettatori è stato del 13% per i programmi di intrattenimento e del 25% per quelli drammatici, e del 10% e 6% rispettivamente per l'attualità e i documentari. Ciò sembra essere dovuto al fatto che le persone preferiscono maggiormente l’intrattenimento a causa della recessione economica.

#######

Man: According to a survey by an organization specializing in viewership ratings, viewership ratings for entertainment programs and dramas are gradually increasing compared to last year, while ratings for current affairs and documentaries are gradually declining. Average viewership this year recorded 13% for entertainment programs and 25% for dramas, and 10% and 6% for current affairs and documentaries, respectively. This seems to be because people prefer entertainment more due to the economic recession.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Selon une enquête réalisée par un organisme spécialisé dans l'audience, les audiences des programmes de divertissement et des fictions augmentent progressivement par rapport à l'année dernière, tandis que les audiences des émissions d'actualité et des documentaires diminuent progressivement. L'audience moyenne cette année a enregistré 13 % pour les programmes de divertissement et 25 % pour les dramatiques, et 10 % et 6 % pour les actualités et les documentaires, respectivement. Cela semble être dû au fait que les gens préfèrent davantage le divertissement en raison de la récession économique.

#######

Man: According to a survey by an organization specializing in viewership ratings, viewership ratings for entertainment programs and dramas are gradually increasing compared to last year, while ratings for current affairs and documentaries are gradually declining. Average viewership this year recorded 13% for entertainment programs and 25% for dramas, and 10% and 6% for current affairs and documentaries, respectively. This seems to be because people prefer entertainment more due to the economic recession.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Según una encuesta realizada por una organización especializada en índices de audiencia, los índices de audiencia de programas de entretenimiento y dramas están aumentando gradualmente en comparación con el año pasado, mientras que los índices de audiencia de actualidad y documentales están disminuyendo gradualmente. La audiencia promedio este año registró 13% para programas de entretenimiento y 25% para dramas, y 10% y 6% para temas de actualidad y documentales, respectivamente. Esto parece deberse a que la gente prefiere más el entretenimiento debido a la recesión económica.

#######

Man: According to a survey by an organization specializing in viewership ratings, viewership ratings for entertainment programs and dramas are gradually increasing compared to last year, while ratings for current affairs and documentaries are gradually declining. Average viewership this year recorded 13% for entertainment programs and 25% for dramas, and 10% and 6% for current affairs and documentaries, respectively. This seems to be because people prefer entertainment more due to the economic recession.
g_text_audio_translate.id:

Rata-rata penayangan tahun ini mencatat 13% untuk program hiburan dan 25% untuk drama, serta masing-masing 10% dan 6% untuk acara terkini dan dokumenter. Hal ini tampaknya disebabkan karena masyarakat lebih memilih hiburan akibat resesi ekonomi.

#######

Man: According to a survey by an organization specializing in viewership ratings, viewership ratings for entertainment programs and dramas are gradually increasing compared to last year, while ratings for current affairs and documentaries are gradually declining. This seems to be because people prefer entertainment more due to the economic recession.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性：視聴率専門機関の調査によると、昨年に比べてバラエティ番組やドラマの視聴率が徐々に上がっている一方で、時事番組やドキュメンタリーの視聴率が徐々に下がっているそうです。今年の平均視聴率は娯楽番組が１３％、ドラマが２５％、時事番組とドキュメンタリーがそれぞれ１０％、６％を記録した。これは、不景気の影響で人々が娯楽を好む傾向にあるためと考えられます。

#######

Man: According to a survey by an organization specializing in viewership ratings, viewership ratings for entertainment programs and dramas are gradually increasing compared to last year, while ratings for current affairs and documentaries are gradually declining. g_text_audio_translate.de:

Die durchschnittliche Zuschauerzahl betrug in diesem Jahr 13 % für Unterhaltungssendungen und 25 % für Dramen sowie 10 % bzw. 6 % für aktuelle Ereignisse und Dokumentationen. Dies scheint darauf zurückzuführen zu sein, dass die Menschen aufgrund der wirtschaftlichen Rezession mehr Unterhaltung bevorzugen.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 지난해 한국 청소년들의 여가 활동을 조사한 결과 게임이 가장 많은 것으로 조사되었습니다. 그 다음으로는 TV 시청, 사교 활동, 자기 계발 순으로 나타났습니다. 게임은 33%, TV 시청은 25%로 조사에 응답한 10대 청소년 절반 이상이 여가 활동으로 게임과 TV 시청을 하고 있다는 것을 알 수 있습니다. 이처럼 청소년들의 여가 활동이 게임과 TV 시청에만 몰린 이유는 무엇일까요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Theo một cuộc khảo sát về các hoạt động giải trí của thanh thiếu niên Hàn Quốc vào năm ngoái, đứng thứ nhất là game. Kế đến theo thứ tự lần lượt là xem TV, hoạt động giao lưu, và phát triển cá nhân. Trong cuộc khảo sát với 33% là chơi game và 25% là xem TV, có thể thấy rằng hơn một nửa số thanh thiếu niên được khảo sát chơi game và xem TV như một hoạt động giải trí của mình. Tại sao các hoạt động giải trí của thanh thiếu niên lại chỉ tập trung vào chơi game và xem TV như vậy?
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: As a result of research on leisure activities of Korean teenagers last year, games were found to be the most popular. This was followed by watching TV, socializing, and self-improvement. Gaming is 33% and TV watching is 25%, indicating that more than half of the teenagers who responded to the survey play games and watch TV as leisure activities. What is the reason why teenagers' leisure activities are concentrated only in games and watching TV?
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Come risultato di una ricerca sulle attività ricreative degli adolescenti coreani l'anno scorso, i giochi sono risultati essere i più popolari. Questo è stato seguito guardando la TV, socializzando e migliorando sé stessi. Il gaming rappresenta il 33% e guardare la TV il 25%, indicando che più della metà degli adolescenti che hanno risposto al sondaggio giocano e guardano la TV come attività ricreative. Qual è il motivo per cui le attività ricreative degli adolescenti si concentrano solo sui giochi e sulla televisione?

#######

Man: As a result of research on leisure activities of Korean teenagers last year, games were found to be the most popular. This was followed by watching TV, socializing, and self-improvement. Gaming is 33% and TV watching is 25%, indicating that more than half of the teenagers who responded to the survey play games and watch TV as leisure activities. What is the reason why teenagers' leisure activities are concentrated only in games and watching TV?
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Suite à une recherche sur les activités de loisirs des adolescents coréens l'année dernière, les jeux se sont révélés être les plus populaires. Cela a été suivi par le fait de regarder la télévision, de socialiser et de s’améliorer. Les jeux représentent 33 % et la télévision 25 %, ce qui indique que plus de la moitié des adolescents qui ont répondu à l'enquête jouent à des jeux et regardent la télévision comme activités de loisirs. Quelle est la raison pour laquelle les loisirs des adolescents se concentrent uniquement sur les jeux et la télévision ?

#######

Man: As a result of research on leisure activities of Korean teenagers last year, games were found to be the most popular. This was followed by watching TV, socializing, and self-improvement. Gaming is 33% and TV watching is 25%, indicating that more than half of the teenagers who responded to the survey play games and watch TV as leisure activities. What is the reason why teenagers' leisure activities are concentrated only in games and watching TV?
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Como resultado de una investigación sobre las actividades de ocio de los adolescentes coreanos el año pasado, se descubrió que los juegos son los más populares. A esto le siguió mirar televisión, socializar y superarse personalmente. El 33% juega y el 25% mira televisión, lo que indica que más de la mitad de los adolescentes que respondieron a la encuesta juegan y miran televisión como actividades de ocio. ¿Cuál es la razón por la que las actividades de ocio de los adolescentes se concentran únicamente en los juegos y ver la televisión?

#######

Man: As a result of research on leisure activities of Korean teenagers last year, games were found to be the most popular. This was followed by watching TV, socializing, and self-improvement. Gaming is 33% and TV watching is 25%, indicating that more than half of the teenagers who responded to the survey play games and watch TV as leisure activities. What is the reason why teenagers' leisure activities are concentrated only in games and watching TV?
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Berdasarkan hasil penelitian mengenai aktivitas rekreasi remaja Korea tahun lalu, game ditemukan sebagai game yang paling populer. Disusul dengan menonton TV, bersosialisasi, dan pengembangan diri. Bermain game sebesar 33% dan menonton TV sebesar 25%, menunjukkan bahwa lebih dari separuh remaja yang menanggapi survei ini bermain game dan menonton TV sebagai aktivitas rekreasi. Apa alasan kegiatan rekreasi remaja hanya terkonsentrasi pada permainan dan menonton TV?

#######

Man: As a result of research on leisure activities of Korean teenagers last year, games were found to be the most popular. This was followed by watching TV, socializing, and self-improvement. Gaming is 33% and TV watching is 25%, indicating that more than half of the teenagers who responded to the survey play games and watch TV as leisure activities. What is the reason why teenagers' leisure activities are concentrated only in games and watching TV?
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性：昨年、韓国の青少年の余暇活動を調査した結果、ゲームが最も人気だったことが分かりました。続いて、テレビを見ること、社交的なこと、自己啓発をすることが続きました。ゲームが 33%、テレビ視聴が 25% であり、調査に回答した 10 代の若者の半数以上が余暇活動としてゲームやテレビ視聴をしていることがわかります。 10代の若者の余暇活動がゲームやテレビばかりに集中してしまう理由は何でしょうか？

#######

Man: As a result of research on leisure activities of Korean teenagers last year, games were found to be the most popular. This was followed by watching TV, socializing, and self-improvement. Gaming is 33% and TV watching is 25%, indicating that more than half of the teenagers who responded to the survey play games and watch TV as leisure activities. What is the reason why teenagers' leisure activities are concentrated only in games and watching TV?
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Als Ergebnis einer Untersuchung über Freizeitaktivitäten koreanischer Teenager im letzten Jahr wurde festgestellt, dass Spiele am beliebtesten sind. Es folgten Fernsehen, geselliges Beisammensein und Selbstverwirklichung. Gaming macht 33 % und Fernsehen 25 % aus, was darauf hindeutet, dass mehr als die Hälfte der Teenager, die an der Umfrage teilgenommen haben, Spiele spielen und fernsehen als Freizeitbeschäftigungen. Was ist der Grund dafür, dass sich die Freizeitaktivitäten von Teenagern nur auf Spiele und Fernsehen konzentrieren?

#######

Man: As a result of research on leisure activities of Korean teenagers last year, games were found to be the most popular. This was followed by watching TV, socializing, and self-improvement. Gaming is 33% and TV watching is 25%, indicating that more than half of the teenagers who responded to the survey play games and watch TV as leisure activities. What is the reason why teenagers' leisure activities are concentrated only in games and watching TV?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：去年对韩国青少年休闲活动的调查显示，游戏最受欢迎。接下来是看电视、社交和自我提升。玩游戏的比例为33%，看电视的比例为25%，这表明超过一半的受访青少年将玩游戏和看电视作为休闲活动。是什么原因导致青少年的休闲活动只集中在游戏和看电视上呢？

#######

Man: As a result of research on leisure activities of Korean teenagers last year, games were found to be the most popular. This was followed by watching TV, socializing, and self-improvement. Gaming is 33% and TV watching is 25%, indicating that more than half of the teenagers who responded to the survey play games and watch TV as leisure activities. What is the reason why teenagers' leisure activities are concentrated only in games and watching TV?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：去年對韓國青少年休閒活動的調查顯示，遊戲最受歡迎。接下來是看電視、社交和自我提升。玩遊戲的比例為33%，看電視的比例為25%，這表明超過一半的受訪青少年將玩遊戲和看電視作為休閒活動。是什麼原因導致青少年的休閒活動只集中在遊戲和看電視上呢？

#######

Man: As a result of research on leisure activities of Korean teenagers last year, games were found to be the most popular. This was followed by watching TV, socializing, and self-improvement. Gaming is 33% and TV watching is 25%, indicating that more than half of the teenagers who responded to the survey play games and watch TV as leisure activities. What is the reason why teenagers' leisure activities are concentrated only in games and watching TV?
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: В результате прошлогоднего исследования досуга корейских подростков самыми популярными оказались игры. Затем последовал просмотр телевизора, общение и самосовершенствование. Игры составляют 33%, а просмотр телевизора — 25%, что указывает на то, что более половины подростков, ответивших на опрос, играют в игры и смотрят телевизор в качестве досуга. В чем причина того, что досуг подростков сосредоточен только в играх и просмотре телевизора?

#######

Man: As a result of research on leisure activities of Korean teenagers last year, games were found to be the most popular. This was followed by watching TV, socializing, and self-improvement. Gaming is 33% and TV watching is 25%, indicating that more than half of the teenagers who responded to the survey play games and watch TV as leisure activities. What is the reason why teenagers' leisure activities are concentrated only in games and watching TV?
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: จากการวิจัยกิจกรรมยามว่างของวัยรุ่นเกาหลีเมื่อปีที่แล้ว พบว่า เกมได้รับความนิยมมากที่สุด ตามมาด้วยการดูทีวี การเข้าสังคม และการพัฒนาตนเอง การเล่นเกมอยู่ที่ 33% และการดูทีวีอยู่ที่ 25% บ่งชี้ว่าวัยรุ่นมากกว่าครึ่งที่ตอบแบบสำรวจเล่นเกมและดูทีวีเป็นกิจกรรมยามว่าง เหตุใดกิจกรรมยามว่างของวัยรุ่นจึงเน้นแต่การเล่นเกมและการดูทีวีเท่านั้น

#######

Man: As a result of research on leisure activities of Korean teenagers last year, games were found to be the most popular. This was followed by watching TV, socializing, and self-improvement. Gaming is 33% and TV watching is 25%, indicating that more than half of the teenagers who responded to the survey play games and watch TV as leisure activities. What is the reason why teenagers' leisure activities are concentrated only in games and watching TV?
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Como resultado de uma pesquisa sobre atividades de lazer de adolescentes coreanos no ano passado, os jogos foram considerados os mais populares. Isto foi seguido por assistir TV, socializar e auto-aperfeiçoamento. O jogo é de 33% e o consumo de televisão é de 25%, indicando que mais de metade dos adolescentes que responderam ao inquérito jogam e vêem televisão como atividades de lazer. Qual a razão pela qual as atividades de lazer dos adolescentes se concentram apenas em jogos e em assistir TV?

#######

Man: As a result of research on leisure activities of Korean teenagers last year, games were found to be the most popular. This was followed by watching TV, socializing, and self-improvement. Gaming is 33% and TV watching is 25%, indicating that more than half of the teenagers who responded to the survey play games and watch TV as leisure activities. What is the reason why teenagers' leisure activities are concentrated only in games and watching TV?
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: पिछले साल कोरियाई किशोरों की अवकाश गतिविधियों पर शोध के परिणामस्वरूप, खेल सबसे लोकप्रिय पाए गए। इसके बाद टीवी देखना, मेलजोल बढ़ाना और आत्म-सुधार करना शुरू हुआ। गेमिंग 33% है और टीवी देखना 25% है, जो दर्शाता है कि सर्वेक्षण में प्रतिक्रिया देने वाले आधे से अधिक किशोर गेम खेलते हैं और टीवी को अवकाश गतिविधियों के रूप में देखते हैं। क्या कारण है कि किशोरों की अवकाश गतिविधियाँ केवल खेल और टीवी देखने तक ही केंद्रित रहती हैं?

#######

Man: As a result of research on leisure activities of Korean teenagers last year, games were found to be the most popular. This was followed by watching TV, socializing, and self-improvement. Gaming is 33% and TV watching is 25%, indicating that more than half of the teenagers who responded to the survey play games and watch TV as leisure activities. What is the reason why teenagers' leisure activities are concentrated only in games and watching TV?
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Erkek: Geçen yıl Koreli gençlerin boş zaman etkinlikleri üzerine yapılan araştırma sonucunda oyunların en popüler olduğu ortaya çıktı. Bunu televizyon izleme, sosyalleşme ve kendini geliştirme takip etti. Oyun oynama oranı %33 ve TV izleme oranı %25 olup, bu da ankete yanıt veren gençlerin yarısından fazlasının boş zaman aktivitesi olarak oyun oynadığını ve TV izlediğini göstermektedir. Gençlerin boş zaman etkinliklerinin yalnızca oyun ve TV izleme üzerine yoğunlaşmasının nedeni nedir?

#######

Man: As a result of research on leisure activities of Korean teenagers last year, games were found to be the most popular. This was followed by watching TV, socializing, and self-improvement. Gaming is 33% and TV watching is 25%, indicating that more than half of the teenagers who responded to the survey play games and watch TV as leisure activities. What is the reason why teenagers' leisure activities are concentrated only in games and watching TV?

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 하루 평균 인터넷 사용 시간을 연령대별로 조사했습니다. 그 결과 10대가 2.2시간, 20대 3.6시간, 30대 3.4시간, 40대 2.7시간으로 나타났습니다. 이 중 10대 미만 어린이들의 경우 평균 두 시간을 사용하는 것으로 조사되었습니다. 다른 연령대의 경우 인터넷을 업무 등의 용도로 사용하는 연령대임을 고려하면, 10살 미만 어린이의 인터넷 의존이 상당히 높은 수준이라고 할 수 있습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Mức độ sử dụng Internet trung bình hàng ngày theo nhóm tuổi đã được khảo sát. Kết quả là độ tuổi 10 sử dụng Internet 2,2 giờ một ngày, độ tuổi 20 là 3,6 giờ, độ tuổi 30 là 3,4 giờ và độ tuổi 40 là 2,7 ​​giờ. Trong số đó, trẻ em dưới 10 tuổi dành trung bình hai giờ sử dụng Internet một ngày. Xét đến việc các nhóm tuổi khác sử dụng Internet cho công việc và các mục đích khác, có thể nói trẻ em dưới 10 tuổi phụ thuộc rất nhiều vào Internet.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: The average internet usage time per day was investigated by age group. As a result, teenagers spent 2.2 hours, 20s 3.6 hours, 30s 3.4 hours, and 40s 2.7 hours. Among them, it was investigated that children under the age of 10 used an average of two hours. Considering that other age groups use the Internet for purposes such as work, it can be said that children under the age of 10 have a fairly high level of Internet dependence.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: è stato analizzato il tempo medio di utilizzo giornaliero di Internet per fascia di età. Di conseguenza, gli adolescenti hanno trascorso 2,2 ore, i ventenni 3,6 ore, i trentenni 3,4 ore e i quarantenni 2,7 ore. Tra questi, è stato studiato che i bambini di età inferiore ai 10 anni utilizzavano in media due ore. Considerando che altre fasce d'età utilizzano Internet per scopi lavorativi, si può affermare che i bambini sotto i 10 anni presentano un livello di dipendenza da Internet abbastanza elevato.

#######

Man: The average internet usage time per day was investigated by age group. As a result, teenagers spent 2.2 hours, 20s 3.6 hours, 30s 3.4 hours, and 40s 2.7 hours. Among them, it was investigated that children under the age of 10 used an average of two hours. Considering that other age groups use the Internet for purposes such as work, it can be said that children under the age of 10 have a fairly high level of Internet dependence.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : La durée moyenne d'utilisation d'Internet par jour a été étudiée par tranche d'âge. En conséquence, les adolescents ont passé 2,2 heures, les 20 ans 3,6 heures, les 30 ans 3,4 heures et les 40 ans 2,7 heures. Parmi eux, il a été étudié que les enfants de moins de 10 ans utilisaient en moyenne deux heures. Étant donné que d'autres tranches d'âge utilisent Internet à des fins telles que le travail, on peut dire que les enfants de moins de 10 ans ont un niveau de dépendance à Internet assez élevé.

#######

Man: The average internet usage time per day was investigated by age group. As a result, teenagers spent 2.2 hours, 20s 3.6 hours, 30s 3.4 hours, and 40s 2.7 hours. Among them, it was investigated that children under the age of 10 used an average of two hours. Considering that other age groups use the Internet for purposes such as work, it can be said that children under the age of 10 have a fairly high level of Internet dependence.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Se investigó el tiempo promedio de uso de Internet por día por grupo de edad. Como resultado, los adolescentes pasaron 2,2 horas, los de 20 años 3,6 horas, los de 30 años 3,4 horas y los de 40 años 2,7 horas. Entre ellos, se investigó que los niños menores de 10 años utilizaban en promedio dos horas. Teniendo en cuenta que otros grupos de edad utilizan Internet con fines como el trabajo, se puede decir que los niños menores de 10 años tienen un nivel de dependencia de Internet bastante alto.

#######

Considering that other age groups use the Internet for purposes such as work, it can be said that children under the age of 10 have a fairly high level of Internet dependence.

Diantaranya, diketahui bahwa anak-anak di bawah usia 10 tahun menggunakan rata-rata dua jam. Mengingat kelompok usia lain menggunakan Internet untuk tujuan seperti bekerja, maka dapat dikatakan bahwa anak-anak di bawah usia 10 tahun memiliki tingkat ketergantungan Internet yang cukup tinggi.

Considering that other age groups use the Internet for purposes such as work, it can be said that children under the age of 10 have a fairly high level of Internet dependence.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:

Wenn man bedenkt, dass andere Altersgruppen das Internet beispielsweise beruflich nutzen, lässt sich sagen, dass Kinder unter 10 Jahren ein recht hohes Maß an Internetabhängigkeit aufweisen.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 한 설문 조사에 따르면 요즘 대학생들은 과거에 비해 취업률이 낮아지면서 직업 선택의 조건도 많이 달라졌다고 합니다. 대학생들이 직업 선택 시 중요하게 생각하는 것은 '개인의 적성’이 가장 많았습니다. 그 다음으로는 안정성, 보수, 기타가 그 뒤를 이었습니다. 한편 최근 이직률이 높아졌는데 이는 취업률이 낮아지면서 첫 직장은 평생 직장이라는 인식이 변화된 것으로 보입니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Theo một cuộc khảo sát, sinh viên đại học ngày nay có tỷ lệ có việc làm thấp hơn trước đây, và các điều kiện để lựa chọn một công việc đã thay đổi rất nhiều. Điều quan trọng nhất mà sinh viên đại học cân nhắc khi chọn một công việc là 'năng khiếu cá nhân'. Tiếp theo là sự ổn định, lương thưởng và các thứ khác. Trong khi đó, tỷ lệ thay đổi công ty gần đây đã tăng lên, điều này cho thấy tỷ lệ có việc làm giảm xuống và nhận thức rằng công việc đầu tiên là công việc suốt đời đã thay đổi.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: According to a survey, college students these days have lower employment rates compared to the past, and the conditions for choosing a job have changed a lot. 'Personal aptitude' was the most important thing for college students when choosing a job. This is followed by stability, remuneration, and others. On the other hand, the turnover rate has recently risen, this shows a drop in employment rates and the perception that a first job is a lifetime job has changed.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Secondo un sondaggio, oggi gli studenti universitari hanno tassi di occupazione più bassi rispetto al passato, e le condizioni per scegliere un lavoro sono molto cambiate. L'"attitudine personale" era la cosa più importante per gli studenti universitari nella scelta di un lavoro. Seguono stabilità, remunerazione e altri. D'altro canto, il tasso di turnover è recentemente aumentato, ciò dimostra un calo dei tassi di occupazione ed è cambiata la percezione che il primo lavoro sia un lavoro a vita.

#######

Man: According to a survey, college students these days have lower employment rates compared to the past, and the conditions for choosing a job have changed a lot. 'Personal aptitude' was the most important thing for college students when choosing a job. This is followed by stability, remuneration, and others. On the other hand, the turnover rate has recently risen, this shows a drop in employment rates and the perception that a first job is a lifetime job has changed.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Selon une enquête, les étudiants ont aujourd'hui des taux d'emploi inférieurs à ceux du passé et les conditions de choix d'un emploi ont beaucoup changé. « L'aptitude personnelle » était la chose la plus importante pour les étudiants lors du choix d'un emploi. Viennent ensuite la stabilité, la rémunération et autres. En revanche, le taux de rotation a récemment augmenté, ce qui montre une baisse des taux d'emploi et la perception selon laquelle un premier emploi est un emploi à vie a changé.

#######

Man: According to a survey, college students these days have lower employment rates compared to the past, and the conditions for choosing a job have changed a lot. 'Personal aptitude' was the most important thing for college students when choosing a job. This is followed by stability, remuneration, and others. On the other hand, the turnover rate has recently risen, this shows a drop in employment rates and the perception that a first job is a lifetime job has changed.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Según una encuesta, los estudiantes universitarios hoy en día tienen tasas de empleo más bajas que en el pasado y las condiciones para elegir un trabajo han cambiado mucho. La "aptitud personal" era lo más importante para los estudiantes universitarios a la hora de elegir un trabajo. A esto le sigue la estabilidad, la remuneración y otros. Por otro lado, la tasa de rotación ha aumentado recientemente, lo que muestra una caída en las tasas de empleo y ha cambiado la percepción de que un primer empleo es un trabajo para toda la vida.

#######

Man: According to a survey, college students these days have lower employment rates compared to the past, and the conditions for choosing a job have changed a lot. 'Personal aptitude' was the most important thing for college students when choosing a job. This is followed by stability, remuneration, and others. On the other hand, the turnover rate has recently risen, this shows a drop in employment rates and the perception that a first job is a lifetime job has changed.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Menurut sebuah survei, mahasiswa saat ini memiliki tingkat pekerjaan yang lebih rendah dibandingkan masa lalu, dan kondisi dalam memilih pekerjaan telah banyak berubah. 'Bakat pribadi' adalah hal terpenting bagi mahasiswa ketika memilih pekerjaan. Disusul stabilitas, remunerasi, dan lain-lain. Di sisi lain, tingkat turnover akhir-akhir ini meningkat, hal ini menunjukkan penurunan tingkat pekerjaan dan persepsi bahwa pekerjaan pertama adalah pekerjaan seumur hidup telah berubah.

#######

Man: According to a survey, college students these days have lower employment rates compared to the past, and the conditions for choosing a job have changed a lot. 'Personal aptitude' was the most important thing for college students when choosing a job. This is followed by stability, remuneration, and others. On the other hand, the turnover rate has recently risen, this shows a drop in employment rates and the perception that a first job is a lifetime job has changed.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性：ある調査によると、最近の大学生は昔に比べて就職率が低くなり、仕事を選ぶ条件も大きく変わってきています。大学生が仕事を選ぶ際に最も重視したのは「個人の適性」だった。次いで安定性、報酬などが続きます。一方で、最近離職率が上昇しており、これは就職率の低下を示しており、最初の仕事は一生の仕事であるという認識が変化しています。

#######

Man: According to a survey, college students these days have lower employment rates compared to the past, and the conditions for choosing a job have changed a lot. 'Personal aptitude' was the most important thing for college students when choosing a job. This is followed by stability, remuneration, and others. On the other hand, the turnover rate has recently risen, this shows a drop in employment rates and the perception that a first job is a lifetime job has changed.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Laut einer Umfrage haben College-Studenten heutzutage niedrigere Beschäftigungsquoten als früher, und die Bedingungen für die Berufswahl haben sich stark verändert. „Persönliche Eignung“ war für Studenten das wichtigste Kriterium bei der Berufswahl. Darauf folgen Stabilität, Vergütung und andere. Andererseits ist die Fluktuationsrate in letzter Zeit gestiegen, was einen Rückgang der Beschäftigungsquoten zeigt und die Wahrnehmung, dass ein erster Job ein Job fürs Leben ist, hat sich geändert.

#######

Man: According to a survey, college students these days have lower employment rates compared to the past, and the conditions for choosing a job have changed a lot. 'Personal aptitude' was the most important thing for college students when choosing a job. This is followed by stability, remuneration, and others. On the other hand, the turnover rate has recently risen, this shows a drop in employment rates and the perception that a first job is a lifetime job has changed.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:

#######

Далее следует стабильность, вознаграждение и прочее. С другой стороны, в последнее время увеличилась текучесть кадров, что свидетельствует о падении уровня занятости и изменении представления о том, что первая работа — это работа на всю жизнь.

#######

On the other hand, the turnover rate has recently risen, this shows a drop in employment rates and the perception that a first job is a lifetime job has changed.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: จากการสำรวจพบว่านักศึกษาวิทยาลัยในปัจจุบันมีอัตราการจ้างงานที่ต่ำกว่าเมื่อก่อน และเงื่อนไขในการเลือกงานก็เปลี่ยนไปมาก 'ความถนัดส่วนบุคคล' เป็นสิ่งสำคัญที่สุดสำหรับนักศึกษาในการเลือกงาน ตามมาด้วยความมั่นคง ค่าตอบแทน และอื่นๆ ในทางกลับกัน อัตราการลาออกได้เพิ่มขึ้นเมื่อเร็วๆ นี้ ซึ่งแสดงให้เห็นอัตราการจ้างงานที่ลดลง และการรับรู้ว่างานแรกคืองานตลอดชีวิตได้เปลี่ยนไป

Man: According to a survey, college students these days have lower employment rates compared to the past, and the conditions for choosing a job have changed a lot. 'Personal aptitude' was the most important thing for college students when choosing a job. This is followed by stability, remuneration, and others. On the other hand, the turnover rate has recently risen, this shows a drop in employment rates and the perception that a first job is a lifetime job has changed.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: De acordo com uma pesquisa, os estudantes universitários hoje em dia têm taxas de emprego mais baixas em comparação com o passado e as condições para escolher um emprego mudaram muito. A 'aptidão pessoal' foi a coisa mais importante para os estudantes universitários na escolha de um emprego. Isto é seguido por estabilidade, remuneração e outros. Por outro lado, a taxa de rotatividade aumentou recentemente, o que demonstra uma queda nas taxas de emprego e mudou a percepção de que o primeiro emprego é um emprego para toda a vida.

#######
