g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: एक सर्वेक्षण के अनुसार, आजकल कॉलेज के छात्रों में पहले की तुलना में रोजगार दर कम है, और नौकरी चुनने की स्थितियां भी बहुत बदल गई हैं। नौकरी चुनते समय कॉलेज के छात्रों के लिए 'व्यक्तिगत योग्यता' सबसे महत्वपूर्ण बात थी। इसके बाद स्थिरता, पारिश्रमिक और अन्य चीजें आती हैं। दूसरी ओर, टर्नओवर दर हाल ही में बढ़ी है, यह रोजगार दरों में गिरावट को दर्शाता है और यह धारणा बदल गई है कि पहली नौकरी जीवन भर की नौकरी है।

Üniversite öğrencileri için iş seçerken en önemli şey 'kişisel yetenek'ti. Bunu istikrar, ücretlendirme ve diğerleri takip ediyor. Öte yandan son dönemde işten ayrılma oranının artması, istihdam oranlarının düştüğünü ve ilk işin ömür boyu iş olduğu algısının değiştiğini gösteriyor.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 얼마 전 발표된 '출판 시장 현황 조사'에 따르면 종이책의 매출은 감소하고 있는 반면 전자책의 매출은 증가하는 것으로 나타났습니다. 이 중 전자책을 구입하는 이유를 살펴보면 가지고 다니기 좋다는 응답이 가장 높은 순위를 차지하였고 사는 방법이 편하다, 종이책에 비해 싸다는 응답이 그뒤를 이었습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Theo 'Khảo sát tình trạng thị trường xuất bản' được công bố gần đây, doanh số bán sách giấy đang giảm trong khi doanh số bán sách điện tử ngày càng tăng. Trong số đó, khi nhìn vào lý do mua sách điện tử, câu trả lời rằng nó thuận tiện mang theo chiếm thứ hạng cao nhất, tiếp theo là câu trả lời rằng cách thức mua tiện lợi và rẻ hơn sách giấy.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: According to the 'Publishing Market Status Survey' recently announced, sales of paper books are decreasing, while sales of e-books are increasing. Among them, when looking at the reasons for purchasing e-books, the response that it is convenient to carry was the highest, followed by the response that it is convenient to buy and that it is cheaper than paper books.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Secondo il "Publishing Market Status Survey" recentemente annunciato, le vendite di libri cartacei stanno diminuendo, mentre le vendite di e-book sono in aumento. Tra questi, se si esaminano le ragioni dell'acquisto di e-book, la risposta più alta è che è conveniente portarsi dietro, seguita dalla risposta che è conveniente acquistare e che è più economico dei libri cartacei.

#######

Man: According to the 'Publishing Market Status Survey' recently announced, sales of paper books are decreasing, while sales of e-books are increasing. Among them, when looking at the reasons for purchasing e-books, the response that it is convenient to carry was the highest, followed by the response that it is convenient to buy and that it is cheaper than paper books.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Selon l'enquête sur l'état du marché de l'édition récemment annoncée, les ventes de livres papier diminuent, tandis que les ventes de livres électroniques augmentent. Parmi eux, lorsqu'on examine les raisons d'acheter des livres électroniques, la réponse selon laquelle il est pratique de transporter était la plus élevée, suivie par la réponse selon laquelle il est pratique d'acheter et qu'il est moins cher que les livres papier.

Entre ellos, al analizar los motivos para comprar libros electrónicos, la respuesta que es conveniente llevar consigo fue la más alta, seguida de la respuesta que es conveniente comprarlo y que es más barato que los libros en papel.

Among them, when looking at the reasons for purchasing e-books, the response that it is convenient to carry was the highest, followed by the response that it is convenient to buy and that it is cheaper than paper books.

explain.vi: Đoạn băng cho biết doanh số bán sách giấy đang giảm trong khi doanh số bán sách điện tử ngày càng tăng, như vậy 4 là đáp án đúng. Đáp án 1 và 3 loại vì thứ hạng các lý do mua sách điện tử không đúng.
explain.en: The sales of paper books is decreasing while the sales of e-books is rising, so the correct answer is 4. 1 and 3 are wrong because the percentage of reasons for buying e-books is not suitable.
explain.it:
Le vendite di libri cartacei diminuiscono mentre crescono quelle di e-book, quindi la risposta corretta è 4. 1 e 3 sono sbagliate perché la percentuale di motivi per acquistare e-book non è adeguata.

#######

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 최근 발표된 ‘고등학생의 아침 식사 실태' 조사 결과에 따르면 아침을 안 먹는 학생이 남녀를 합쳐 30% 가까이 되는 것으로 드러났습니다. 아침을 먹는 학생들이라도 제대로 된 식사를 하는 경우가 적었습니다. 남학생의 경우 우유를 가장 많이 먹는 것으로 나타났고, 뒤를 이어 빵이나 과자, 밥과 국, 과일 순이었습니다. 반면 여학생의 경우 빵이나 과자가 1위를 차지했고 우유, 과일, 밥과 국이 그 뒤를 이었습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Theo kết quả của cuộc khảo sát 'Tình trạng bữa sáng của học sinh trung học phổ thông' được công bố gần đây, số học sinh không ăn sáng chiếm gần 30% tổng số nam nữ. Ngay cả những học sinh có ăn sáng cũng ít khi ăn đúng. Trong trường hợp của học sinh nam, người ta thấy rằng sữa được dùng nhiều nhất, sau đó lần lượt là bánh mì hoặc đồ ngọt, cơm và súp và cuối cùng là trái cây. Mặt khác, đối với học sinh nữ, bánh mì hoặc đồ ngọt chiếm vị trí đầu tiên, sau đó là sữa, trái cây và cuối cùng là cơm và súp.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: According to the results of the recently announced ‘Breakfast Eating Status of High School Students’ study, nearly 30% of both male and female students do not eat breakfast. Even students who ate breakfast rarely ate a full meal. In the case of male students, milk was found to be the most consumed, followed by bread or snacks, rice and soup, and fruit. On the other hand, for female students, bread or snacks took first place, followed by milk, fruit, and rice and soup.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Secondo i risultati dello studio recentemente annunciato “Breakfast Eating Status of High School Students”, quasi il 30% degli studenti, sia maschi che femmine, non fa colazione. Anche gli studenti che facevano colazione raramente consumavano un pasto completo. Nel caso degli studenti maschi, il latte è risultato il più consumato, seguito da pane o snack, riso e zuppa e frutta. Per le studentesse, invece, al primo posto c'erano il pane o gli spuntini, seguiti da latte, frutta, riso e zuppa.

#######

Man: According to the results of the recently announced ‘Breakfast Eating Status of High School Students’ study, nearly 30% of both male and female students do not eat breakfast. Even students who ate breakfast rarely ate a full meal. In the case of male students, milk was found to be the most consumed, followed by bread or snacks, rice and soup, and fruit. On the other hand, for female students, bread or snacks took first place, followed by milk, fruit, and rice and soup.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Selon les résultats de l’étude récemment annoncée sur le « Statut de consommation du petit-déjeuner des élèves du secondaire », près de 30 % des étudiants, hommes et femmes, ne prennent pas de petit-déjeuner. Même les étudiants qui prenaient leur petit-déjeuner prenaient rarement un repas complet. Dans le cas des étudiants de sexe masculin, le lait était le produit le plus consommé, suivi du pain ou des collations, du riz et de la soupe, et des fruits. En revanche, pour les étudiantes, le pain ou les collations occupent la première place, suivis du lait, des fruits, du riz et de la soupe.

#######

Man: According to the results of the recently announced ‘Breakfast Eating Status of High School Students’ study, nearly 30% of both male and female students do not eat breakfast. Even students who ate breakfast rarely ate a full meal. In the case of male students, milk was found to be the most consumed, followed by bread or snacks, rice and soup, and fruit. On the other hand, for female students, bread or snacks took first place, followed by milk, fruit, and rice and soup.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Según los resultados del estudio recientemente anunciado "Estado de alimentación en el desayuno de los estudiantes de secundaria", casi el 30% de los estudiantes, tanto hombres como mujeres, no desayunan. Incluso los estudiantes que desayunaban rara vez comían una comida completa. En el caso de los estudiantes varones, la leche resultó ser la más consumida, seguida del pan o snacks, el arroz y sopa, y la fruta. En cambio, para las alumnas, el pan o snacks ocupó el primer lugar, seguido de la leche, la fruta y el arroz y la sopa.

g_text_audio_translate.id:
Laki-laki: Menurut hasil penelitian ‘Status Makan Sarapan Siswa Sekolah Menengah’ yang baru-baru ini diumumkan, hampir 30% siswa laki-laki dan perempuan tidak sarapan. Bahkan siswa yang sarapan pun jarang makan makanan lengkap. Pada kasus pelajar laki-laki, susu merupakan makanan yang paling banyak dikonsumsi, disusul roti atau makanan ringan, nasi dan sup, serta buah-buahan. Sedangkan untuk siswi, roti atau makanan ringan menempati urutan pertama, disusul susu, buah, serta nasi dan sup.

Bei den männlichen Studierenden wurde festgestellt, dass Milch am häufigsten konsumiert wurde, gefolgt von Brot oder Snacks, Reis und Suppe sowie Obst. Bei den Studentinnen hingegen standen Brot oder Snacks an erster Stelle, gefolgt von Milch, Obst sowie Reis und Suppe.

आदमी: हाल ही में घोषित 'हाई स्कूल छात्रों के नाश्ता खाने की स्थिति' अध्ययन के नतीजों के मुताबिक, लगभग 30% पुरुष और महिला छात्र नाश्ता नहीं करते हैं। यहां तक ​​कि नाश्ता करने वाले छात्र भी शायद ही कभी पूरा खाना खाते हैं। पुरुष छात्रों के मामले में, दूध का सेवन सबसे अधिक पाया गया, उसके बाद ब्रेड या स्नैक्स, चावल और सूप और फल का स्थान आता है। दूसरी ओर, महिला छात्रों के लिए, ब्रेड या स्नैक्स पहले स्थान पर रहे, उसके बाद दूध, फल और चावल और सूप रहे।

Kahvaltı yapan öğrenciler bile nadiren tam öğün yiyorlardı. Erkek öğrencilerde ise en çok süt tüketilirken, bunu ekmek veya atıştırmalıklar, pirinç ve çorba ve meyve takip etti. Kız öğrencilerde ise ekmek ve atıştırmalıklar ilk sırada yer alırken, bunu süt, meyve, pilav ve çorba takip etti.

explain.vi: Đáp án 1 và 3 có tổng số học sinh không ăn sáng lớn hơn 30% nên loại. Đáp án 2 có thứ tự các thực phẩm mà học sinh nam dùng cho bữa sáng đúng. Như vậy 2 là đáp án chính xác.
explain.en: 1 and 3 have a total number of students who don't have breakfast more than 30%, so they are wrong. 2 has the correct percentage of foods that male students eat for breakfast. So, the correct answer is 2.
explain.it:
1 e 3 hanno un numero totale di studenti che non fanno colazione più del 30%, quindi si sbagliano. 2 contiene la percentuale corretta di alimenti che gli studenti maschi mangiano a colazione. Quindi la risposta corretta è 2.

#######

1 and 3 have a total number of students who don't have breakfast more than 30%, so they are wrong. 2 has the correct percentage of foods that male students eat for breakfast. So, the correct answer is 2.
explain.fr:
1 et 3 ont un nombre total d'élèves qui ne prennent pas de petit-déjeuner à plus de 30 %, ils se trompent donc. 2 indique le pourcentage correct d’aliments que les étudiants de sexe masculin consomment au petit-déjeuner. La bonne réponse est donc 2.

#######

1 and 3 have a total number of students who don't have breakfast more than 30%, so they are wrong. 2 has the correct percentage of foods that male students eat for breakfast. So, the correct answer is 2.

1 y 3 tienen un número total de estudiantes que no desayunan más del 30%, por lo que están equivocados. 2 tiene el porcentaje correcto de alimentos que los estudiantes varones comen en el desayuno. Entonces, la respuesta correcta es 2.

#######

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 30대 여성들을 대상으로 가장 하고 싶어 하는 성형 수술을 조사한 결과 코를 고치고 싶다고 한 응답자가 가장 많았으며 살을 빼는 수술이 그 뒤를 이었습니다. 마지막으로 눈 수술을 하고 싶다는 응답이 19%로 나타났습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Trong một cuộc khảo sát về loại phẫu thuật thẩm mỹ mà phụ nữ ở độ tuổi 30 muốn thực hiện nhất, hầu hết những người được hỏi đều cho biết họ muốn sửa mũi, sau đó là phẫu thuật để giảm cân. Cuối cùng, 19% người được hỏi cho biết họ muốn phẫu thuật mắt.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: When we surveyed women in their 30s about the plastic surgery they most wanted to do, the majority of respondents said they wanted to fix their nose, followed by surgery to lose weight. Finally, 19% said they would like to undergo eye surgery.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Quando abbiamo intervistato le donne sui 30 anni riguardo all'intervento di chirurgia plastica che desideravano maggiormente fare, la maggior parte degli intervistati ha affermato di voler sistemare il naso, seguito da un intervento chirurgico per perdere peso. Infine, il 19% ha dichiarato che vorrebbe sottoporsi ad un intervento chirurgico agli occhi.

#######

Man: When we surveyed women in their 30s about the plastic surgery they most wanted to do, the majority of respondents said they wanted to fix their nose, followed by surgery to lose weight. Finally, 19% said they would like to undergo eye surgery.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Lorsque nous avons interrogé des femmes dans la trentaine sur la chirurgie plastique qu'elles souhaitaient le plus faire, la majorité des personnes interrogées ont déclaré vouloir réparer leur nez, suivi d'une intervention chirurgicale pour perdre du poids. Enfin, 19 % ont déclaré qu’ils souhaiteraient subir une chirurgie oculaire.

#######

Man: When we surveyed women in their 30s about the plastic surgery they most wanted to do, the majority of respondents said they wanted to fix their nose, followed by surgery to lose weight. Finally, 19% said they would like to undergo eye surgery.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Cuando encuestamos a mujeres de unos 30 años sobre la cirugía plástica que más querían hacerse, la mayoría de las encuestadas dijeron que querían arreglarse la nariz, seguida de una cirugía para perder peso. Finalmente, el 19% dijo que le gustaría someterse a una cirugía ocular.

#######

Man: When we surveyed women in their 30s about the plastic surgery they most wanted to do, the majority of respondents said they wanted to fix their nose, followed by surgery to lose weight. Finally, 19% said they would like to undergo eye surgery.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Saat kami menyurvei wanita berusia 30an tentang operasi plastik yang paling ingin mereka lakukan, mayoritas responden mengatakan mereka ingin memperbaiki hidungnya, lalu diikuti dengan operasi untuk menurunkan berat badan. Terakhir, 19% menyatakan ingin menjalani operasi mata.

#######

Man: When we surveyed women in their 30s about the plastic surgery they most wanted to do, the majority of respondents said they wanted to fix their nose, followed by surgery to lose weight. Finally, 19% said they would like to undergo eye surgery.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性：30代の女性に一番したい整形についてアンケートをとったところ、「鼻を直したい」が最も多く、次いで「痩せたい」という結果になりました。最後に、19% が目の手術を受けたいと答えました。

#######

Man: When we surveyed women in their 30s about the plastic surgery they most wanted to do, the majority of respondents said they wanted to fix their nose, followed by surgery to lose weight. Finally, 19% said they would like to undergo eye surgery.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Als wir Frauen in den Dreißigern zu der Schönheitsoperation befragten, die sie am liebsten machen würden, gab die Mehrheit der Befragten an, dass sie sich eine Nasenkorrektur und anschließend eine Operation zum Abnehmen wünschen würden. Schließlich gaben 19 % an, dass sie sich gerne einer Augenoperation unterziehen würden.

#######

Man: When we surveyed women in their 30s about the plastic surgery they most wanted to do, the majority of respondents said they wanted to fix their nose, followed by surgery to lose weight. Finally, 19% said they would like to undergo eye surgery.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：当我们对30多岁的女性进行一项关于她们最想做的整形手术的调查时，大多数受访者表示她们想修复鼻子，然后进行减肥手术。最后，19% 的人表示他们愿意接受眼部手术。

#######

Man: When we surveyed women in their 30s about the plastic surgery they most wanted to do, the majority of respondents said they wanted to fix their nose, followed by surgery to lose weight. Finally, 19% said they would like to undergo eye surgery.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：當我們對30多歲的女性進行一項關於她們最想做的整形手術的調查時，大多數受訪者表示她們想修復鼻子，然後進行減肥手術。最後，19% 的人表示他們願意接受眼科手術。

#######

Man: When we surveyed women in their 30s about the plastic surgery they most wanted to do, the majority of respondents said they wanted to fix their nose, followed by surgery to lose weight. Finally, 19% said they would like to undergo eye surgery.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Когда мы опросили женщин в возрасте 30 лет о пластической операции, которую они больше всего хотели бы сделать, большинство респондентов сказали, что хотят исправить нос, а затем сделать операцию, чтобы похудеть. Наконец, 19% заявили, что хотели бы сделать операцию на глазу.

#######

Man: When we surveyed women in their 30s about the plastic surgery they most wanted to do, the majority of respondents said they wanted to fix their nose, followed by surgery to lose weight. Finally, 19% said they would like to undergo eye surgery.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: เมื่อเราสำรวจผู้หญิงอายุ 30 ปีเกี่ยวกับการทำศัลยกรรมพลาสติกที่พวกเธออยากทำมากที่สุด ผู้ตอบแบบสอบถามส่วนใหญ่กล่าวว่าพวกเขาต้องการแก้ไขจมูก ตามด้วยการผ่าตัดเพื่อลดน้ำหนัก สุดท้าย 19% กล่าวว่าพวกเขาต้องการเข้ารับการผ่าตัดตา

#######

Man: When we surveyed women in their 30s about the plastic surgery they most wanted to do, the majority of respondents said they wanted to fix their nose, followed by surgery to lose weight. Finally, 19% said they would like to undergo eye surgery.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Quando entrevistamos mulheres na faixa dos 30 anos sobre a cirurgia plástica que elas mais queriam fazer, a maioria dos entrevistados disse que queria consertar o nariz, seguida de uma cirurgia para perder peso. Por fim, 19% disseram que gostariam de se submeter a uma cirurgia ocular.

#######

Man: When we surveyed women in their 30s about the plastic surgery they most wanted to do, the majority of respondents said they wanted to fix their nose, followed by surgery to lose weight. Finally, 19% said they would like to undergo eye surgery.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
पुरुष: जब हमने 30 वर्ष से अधिक उम्र की महिलाओं से प्लास्टिक सर्जरी के बारे में सर्वेक्षण किया, जो वे सबसे ज्यादा करना चाहती थीं, तो अधिकांश उत्तरदाताओं ने कहा कि वे अपनी नाक ठीक कराना चाहती थीं, इसके बाद वजन कम करने के लिए सर्जरी कराना चाहती थीं। अंत में, 19% ने कहा कि वे आंखों की सर्जरी कराना चाहेंगे।

#######

Man: When we surveyed women in their 30s about the plastic surgery they most wanted to do, the majority of respondents said they wanted to fix their nose, followed by surgery to lose weight. Finally, 19% said they would like to undergo eye surgery.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Erkek: 30'lu yaşlarındaki kadınlara en çok yapmak istedikleri estetik ameliyatı hakkında anket yaptığımızda, katılımcıların çoğunluğu burunlarını düzeltmek istediklerini, ardından da kilo vermek için ameliyat istediklerini söyledi. Son olarak %19'u göz ameliyatı olmak istediğini söyledi.

#######

Man: When we surveyed women in their 30s about the plastic surgery they most wanted to do, the majority of respondents said they wanted to fix their nose, followed by surgery to lose weight. Finally, 19% said they would like to undergo eye surgery.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 서울 시민을 대상으로 출근할 때 이용하는 교통수단을 조사한 결과 지하철 이용객이 가장 많았으며 다음으로 버스 이용객이 많은 것으로 조사되었습니다. 그 뒤를 이어 시민 들이 자가용을 이용해 출근하는 것으로 나타났습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Theo kết quả của cuộc khảo sát về phương tiện di chuyển được sử dụng để đi làm của người dân Seoul, số lượng người sử dụng tàu điện ngầm là nhiều nhất, tiếp theo là số người sử dụng xe buýt. Xếp sau đó là những người sử dụng ô tô riêng của họ để đi làm.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: According to a survey of Seoulites on the means of transportation to work, the number of subway passengers was the highest, followed by bus passengers. It was followed by citizens driving to work.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Secondo un sondaggio condotto tra gli abitanti di Seul sui mezzi di trasporto per recarsi al lavoro, il numero di passeggeri della metropolitana è stato il più alto, seguito dai passeggeri dell'autobus. A seguirlo c'erano i cittadini che si recavano al lavoro.

#######

Man: According to a survey of Seoulites on the means of transportation to work, the number of subway passengers was the highest, followed by bus passengers. It was followed by citizens driving to work.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Selon une enquête menée auprès des Séoulites sur les moyens de transport pour se rendre au travail, le nombre de passagers du métro était le plus élevé, suivi par celui des bus. Il a été suivi par des citoyens se rendant au travail.

#######

Man: According to a survey of Seoulites on the means of transportation to work, the number of subway passengers was the highest, followed by bus passengers. It was followed by citizens driving to work.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Según una encuesta realizada a los habitantes de Seúl sobre los medios de transporte para ir al trabajo, el número de pasajeros del metro fue el más alto, seguido por los pasajeros de autobús. Fue seguido por ciudadanos que se dirigían al trabajo.

#######

Man: According to a survey of Seoulites on the means of transportation to work, the number of subway passengers was the highest, followed by bus passengers. It was followed by citizens driving to work.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Menurut survei warga Seoul mengenai sarana transportasi ke tempat kerja, jumlah penumpang kereta bawah tanah adalah yang tertinggi, diikuti oleh penumpang bus. Diikuti oleh warga yang berkendara ke tempat kerja.

#######

Man: According to a survey of Seoulites on the means of transportation to work, the number of subway passengers was the highest, followed by bus passengers. It was followed by citizens driving to work.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性：ソウル市民を対象に職場までの交通手段を調査したところ、地下鉄の利用者が最も多く、次にバスの利用者が多かった。続いて車で通勤する市民が続いた。

#######

Man: According to a survey of Seoulites on the means of transportation to work, the number of subway passengers was the highest, followed by bus passengers. It was followed by citizens driving to work.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Laut einer Umfrage unter Seoulern zu den Transportmitteln zur Arbeit war die Zahl der U-Bahn-Passagiere am höchsten, gefolgt von Buspassagieren. Es folgten Bürger, die zur Arbeit fuhren.

#######

Man: According to a survey of Seoulites on the means of transportation to work, the number of subway passengers was the highest, followed by bus passengers. It was followed by citizens driving to work.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：根据对首尔人上班交通工具的调查，乘坐地铁的乘客数量最多，其次是公交车。随后是开车上班的市民。

#######

Man: According to a survey of Seoulites on the means of transportation to work, the number of subway passengers was the highest, followed by bus passengers. It was followed by citizens driving to work.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：根據對首爾人上班交通工具的調查，乘坐地鐵的乘客數量最多，其次是公交車。隨後是開車上班的市民。

#######

Man: According to a survey of Seoulites on the means of transportation to work, the number of subway passengers was the highest, followed by bus passengers. It was followed by citizens driving to work.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Согласно опросу жителей Сеула о способах передвижения на работу, наибольшее количество пассажиров было в метро, ​​за ним следовали пассажиры автобусов. За ним следовали граждане, едущие на работу.

#######

Man: According to a survey of Seoulites on the means of transportation to work, the number of subway passengers was the highest, followed by bus passengers. It was followed by citizens driving to work.
g_text_audio_translate.th:

#######

Man: According to a survey of Seoulites on the means of transportation to work, the number of subway passengers was the highest, followed by bus passengers. It was followed by citizens driving to work.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:

#######

Man: According to a survey of Seoulites on the means of transportation to work, the number of subway passengers was the highest, followed by bus passengers. It was followed by citizens driving to work.

#######

Man: According to a survey of Seoulites on the means of transportation to work, the number of subway passengers was the highest, followed by bus passengers. It was followed by citizens driving to work.

#######

Man: According to a survey of Seoulites on the means of transportation to work, the number of subway passengers was the highest, followed by bus passengers. It was followed by citizens driving to work.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 서울에서 지방으로 이동하는 이유를 조사한 결과 이동의 가장 큰 이유는 주택 문제와 일자리 문제 순이며 자녀의 교육 문제도 이동의 주된 원인으로 조사되었습니다. 또 전문가들은 앞으로 이동 인구수가 더 늘 것으로 예상했습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Kết quả điều tra lý do chuyển từ Seoul về các vùng nông thôn cho thấy nguyên nhân lớn nhất của việc chuyển đi là do vấn đề nhà ở rồi đến vấn đề việc làm, vấn đề giáo dục con cái cũng là nguyên nhân chính của việc chuyển đi. Các chuyên gia cũng dự đoán rằng số người di cư sẽ còn tăng lên trong tương lai.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: According to a survey of the reasons for moving from Seoul to the provinces, the biggest reasons for moving were housing problems and job problems, and children's education problems were also the main reasons for the movement. Experts also predicted that the number of people moving will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Secondo un'indagine sui motivi dello spostamento da Seul verso le province, i motivi principali dello spostamento sono stati problemi abitativi e di lavoro, e anche i problemi di istruzione dei bambini sono stati i motivi principali dello spostamento. Gli esperti prevedono inoltre che in futuro il numero di persone in movimento aumenterà.

#######

Man: According to a survey of the reasons for moving from Seoul to the provinces, the biggest reasons for moving were housing problems and job problems, and children's education problems were also the main reasons for the movement. Experts also predicted that the number of people moving will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Selon une enquête sur les raisons de déménager de Séoul vers les provinces, les principales raisons de déménager étaient les problèmes de logement et de travail, et les problèmes d'éducation des enfants étaient également les principales raisons du déménagement. Les experts prédisent également que le nombre de personnes déménageant augmentera à l’avenir.

#######

Man: According to a survey of the reasons for moving from Seoul to the provinces, the biggest reasons for moving were housing problems and job problems, and children's education problems were also the main reasons for the movement. Experts also predicted that the number of people moving will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Según una encuesta sobre las razones para mudarse de Seúl a las provincias, las principales razones para mudarse fueron los problemas de vivienda y de trabajo, y los problemas de educación de los niños también fueron los principales motivos del movimiento. Los expertos también predicen que en el futuro aumentará el número de personas que se desplazan.

#######

Man: According to a survey of the reasons for moving from Seoul to the provinces, the biggest reasons for moving were housing problems and job problems, and children's education problems were also the main reasons for the movement. Experts also predicted that the number of people moving will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Menurut survei tentang alasan pindah dari Seoul ke provinsi, alasan terbesar untuk pindah adalah masalah perumahan dan pekerjaan, dan masalah pendidikan anak juga menjadi alasan utama perpindahan tersebut. Para ahli juga memperkirakan jumlah orang yang berpindah akan meningkat di masa depan.

#######

Man: According to a survey of the reasons for moving from Seoul to the provinces, the biggest reasons for moving were housing problems and job problems, and children's education problems were also the main reasons for the movement. Experts also predicted that the number of people moving will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性：ソウルから地方への移住理由を調査したところ、住居問題と仕事問題が最大の理由で、子供の教育問題も移動の主な理由だった。専門家らは、将来的には人の移動が増えるだろうと予測している。

#######

Man: According to a survey of the reasons for moving from Seoul to the provinces, the biggest reasons for moving were housing problems and job problems, and children's education problems were also the main reasons for the movement. Experts also predicted that the number of people moving will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Laut einer Umfrage zu den Gründen für den Umzug von Seoul in die Provinzen waren Wohnungs- und Arbeitsprobleme die Hauptgründe für den Umzug, und auch die Bildungsprobleme der Kinder waren die Hauptgründe für die Bewegung. Experten prognostizierten zudem, dass die Zahl der Menschen, die umziehen, in Zukunft zunehmen wird.

#######

Man: According to a survey of the reasons for moving from Seoul to the provinces, the biggest reasons for moving were housing problems and job problems, and children's education problems were also the main reasons for the movement. Experts also predicted that the number of people moving will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：根据对从首尔到外省搬家原因的调查显示，搬家的最大原因是住房问题和工作问题，孩子的教育问题也是搬家的主要原因。专家还预测，未来搬家的人数还会增加。

#######

Man: According to a survey of the reasons for moving from Seoul to the provinces, the biggest reasons for moving were housing problems and job problems, and children's education problems were also the main reasons for the movement. Experts also predicted that the number of people moving will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：根據對從首爾到外省搬家原因的調查顯示，搬家的最大原因是住房問題和工作問題，孩子的教育問題也是搬家的主要原因。專家還預測，未來搬家的人數還會增加。

#######

Experts also predicted that the number of people moving will increase in the future.

Мужчина: Согласно исследованию причин переезда из Сеула в провинцию, основными причинами переезда были жилищные проблемы и проблемы с работой, а также проблемы с образованием детей были основными причинами переезда. Эксперты также прогнозируют, что в будущем число переезжающих увеличится.

#######

Man: According to a survey of the reasons for moving from Seoul to the provinces, the biggest reasons for moving were housing problems and job problems, and children's education problems were also the main reasons for the movement. Experts also predicted that the number of people moving will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: จากการสำรวจเหตุผลในการย้ายจากโซลไปยังต่างจังหวัด สาเหตุที่ใหญ่ที่สุดในการย้ายคือปัญหาที่อยู่อาศัยและปัญหางาน และปัญหาการศึกษาของเด็กๆ ก็เป็นสาเหตุหลักของการเคลื่อนไหวเช่นกัน ผู้เชี่ยวชาญยังคาดการณ์ด้วยว่าจำนวนผู้อพยพจะเพิ่มขึ้นในอนาคต

#######

Man: According to a survey of the reasons for moving from Seoul to the provinces, the biggest reasons for moving were housing problems and job problems, and children's education problems were also the main reasons for the movement. Experts also predicted that the number of people moving will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: De acordo com um levantamento dos motivos da mudança de Seul para as províncias, os maiores motivos da mudança foram problemas de habitação e de emprego, e os problemas de educação dos filhos também foram os principais motivos do movimento. Os especialistas também previram que o número de pessoas que se deslocam aumentará no futuro.

#######

Man: According to a survey of the reasons for moving from Seoul to the provinces, the biggest reasons for moving were housing problems and job problems, and children's education problems were also the main reasons for the movement. Experts also predicted that the number of people moving will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: सियोल से प्रांतों में जाने के कारणों के एक सर्वेक्षण के अनुसार, स्थानांतरित होने का सबसे बड़ा कारण आवास की समस्याएं और नौकरी की समस्याएं थीं, और बच्चों की शिक्षा की समस्याएं भी आंदोलन का मुख्य कारण थीं। विशेषज्ञों ने यह भी अनुमान लगाया कि भविष्य में आवाजाही करने वाले लोगों की संख्या में वृद्धि होगी।

#######

Man: According to a survey of the reasons for moving from Seoul to the provinces, the biggest reasons for moving were housing problems and job problems, and children's education problems were also the main reasons for the movement. Experts also predicted that the number of people moving will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Seul'den taşraya taşınmanın nedenleri üzerine yapılan bir araştırmaya göre, taşınmanın en büyük nedenleri barınma sorunları ve iş sorunlarıydı ve çocukların eğitim sorunları da hareketin ana nedenleriydi. Uzmanlar ayrıca gelecekte hareket eden insan sayısının artacağını da öngördü.

#######

Man: According to a survey of the reasons for moving from Seoul to the provinces, the biggest reasons for moving were housing problems and job problems, and children's education problems were also the main reasons for the movement. Experts also predicted that the number of people moving will increase in the future.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 휴대 전화 신규 가입자를 대상으로 전화 요금을 조사한 결과 지난해 8월부터 2월까지 전체적으로 평균 전화 요금이 낮아진 것으로 나타났습니다. 30대의 평균 전화 요금도 같이 낮아졌지만 전체 평균 전화 요금에 비해 더 높은 비용을 내는 것으로 나타났습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Theo kết quả của một cuộc khảo sát hóa đơn điện thoại với đối tượng là thuê bao điện thoại di động mới, người ta thấy rằng hóa đơn điện thoại trung bình nói chung đã giảm từ tháng 8 năm ngoái đến tháng 2. Hóa đơn điện thoại trung bình của những người ở độ tuổi 30 cũng giảm, nhưng người ta thấy rằng họ đang trả nhiều hơn so với hóa đơn điện thoại trung bình nói chung.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: A survey of the phone bills of new mobile phone subscribers found that the average overall phone bill decreased from August to February last year. The average phone bill for those in their 30s also decreased, but were higher than the average overall phone bill.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Da un'indagine sulle bollette telefoniche dei nuovi abbonati di telefonia mobile è emerso che la bolletta telefonica media complessiva è diminuita da agosto a febbraio dello scorso anno. Anche la bolletta telefonica media per i trentenni è diminuita, ma è stata superiore alla bolletta telefonica media complessiva.

#######

Man: A survey of the phone bills of new mobile phone subscribers found that the average overall phone bill decreased from August to February last year. The average phone bill for those in their 30s also decreased, but were higher than the average overall phone bill.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Une enquête sur les factures de téléphone des nouveaux abonnés de téléphonie mobile a révélé que la facture de téléphone globale moyenne a diminué d'août à février de l'année dernière. La facture de téléphone moyenne des personnes dans la trentaine a également diminué, mais elle était supérieure à la facture de téléphone globale moyenne.

#######

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Theo kết quả của cuộc khảo sát thời gian ngủ trung bình ở mỗi quốc gia, các quốc gia có thời gian ngủ dài nhất theo thứ tự đó là Pháp, Mexico và Tây Ban Nha, và quốc gia có thời gian ngủ ít nhất là Hàn Quốc. Sự thiếu ngủ này không liên quan đến thời gian làm việc.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: According to a survey of the average sleep time in each country, France, Mexico, and Spain were the countries with the longest sleep, followed by Korea with the least sleep. This lack of sleep time has been shown to be unrelated to working hours.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Secondo un sondaggio sulla durata media del sonno in ciascun paese, Francia, Messico e Spagna sono stati i paesi con il sonno più lungo, seguiti dalla Corea con il sonno minore. È stato dimostrato che questa mancanza di sonno non è correlata all’orario di lavoro.

#######

Man: According to a survey of the average sleep time in each country, France, Mexico, and Spain were the countries with the longest sleep, followed by Korea with the least sleep. This lack of sleep time has been shown to be unrelated to working hours.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Selon une enquête sur la durée moyenne du sommeil dans chaque pays, la France, le Mexique et l'Espagne étaient les pays où le sommeil était le plus long, suivis par la Corée qui dormait le moins. Il a été démontré que ce manque de temps de sommeil n’est pas lié aux heures de travail.

#######

Man: According to a survey of the average sleep time in each country, France, Mexico, and Spain were the countries with the longest sleep, followed by Korea with the least sleep. This lack of sleep time has been shown to be unrelated to working hours.

#######

Man: According to a survey of the average sleep time in each country, France, Mexico, and Spain were the countries with the longest sleep, followed by Korea with the least sleep. This lack of sleep time has been shown to be unrelated to working hours.

#######

Man: According to a survey of the average sleep time in each country, France, Mexico, and Spain were the countries with the longest sleep, followed by Korea with the least sleep. This lack of sleep time has been shown to be unrelated to working hours.

#######

Man: According to a survey of the average sleep time in each country, France, Mexico, and Spain were the countries with the longest sleep, followed by Korea with the least sleep. This lack of sleep time has been shown to be unrelated to working hours.

#######

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 콜라 소비량에 대한 조사에 따르면 10년간 콜라 소비량이 점점 감소하고 있는 것으로 나타났습니다. 콜라가 건강에 좋지 않다는 생각이 많아지면서 콜라 대신 물이나 차, 주스 등 건강 음료의 소비량이 증가하고 있는 것으로 조사됐습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Một nghiên cứu về lượng tiêu thụ cô ca cho thấy rằng lượng tiêu thụ cô ca đang giảm dần trong 10 năm qua. Khi ngày càng có nhiều người nghĩ rằng cô ca không tốt cho sức khỏe, lượng tiêu thụ đồ uống có lợi cho sức khỏe như nước lọc, trà và nước trái cây ngày càng tăng thay vì cô ca.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: According to a survey of coke consumption, coke consumption has been declining over the past 10 years. Consumption of healthy drinks such as water, tea, and juice is increasing as the perception that coke is not good for health is increasing.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Secondo uno studio sul consumo di coke, negli ultimi 10 anni il consumo di coke è diminuito. Il consumo di bevande salutari come acqua, tè e succhi è in aumento poiché aumenta la percezione che la coca cola non faccia bene alla salute.

#######

Man: According to a survey of coke consumption, coke consumption has been declining over the past 10 years. Consumption of healthy drinks such as water, tea, and juice is increasing as the perception that coke is not good for health is increasing.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Selon une enquête sur la consommation de coke, la consommation de coke a diminué au cours des 10 dernières années. La consommation de boissons saines telles que l’eau, le thé et les jus augmente à mesure que la perception selon laquelle la coca n’est pas bonne pour la santé augmente.

#######

Man: According to a survey of coke consumption, coke consumption has been declining over the past 10 years. Consumption of healthy drinks such as water, tea, and juice is increasing as the perception that coke is not good for health is increasing.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Según una encuesta sobre el consumo de coque, el consumo de coque ha ido disminuyendo en los últimos 10 años. El consumo de bebidas saludables como agua, té y jugo está aumentando a medida que aumenta la percepción de que la coca cola no es buena para la salud.

#######

Man: According to a survey of coke consumption, coke consumption has been declining over the past 10 years. Consumption of healthy drinks such as water, tea, and juice is increasing as the perception that coke is not good for health is increasing.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Menurut survei konsumsi minuman bersoda, konsumsi minuman bersoda telah menurun selama 10 tahun terakhir. Konsumsi minuman sehat seperti air putih, teh, dan jus semakin meningkat seiring dengan meningkatnya persepsi bahwa minuman bersoda tidak baik bagi kesehatan.

#######

Man: According to a survey of coke consumption, coke consumption has been declining over the past 10 years. Consumption of healthy drinks such as water, tea, and juice is increasing as the perception that coke is not good for health is increasing.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性: コークスの消費量に関する調査によると、コークスの消費量は過去 10 年間で減少しています。コーラは健康に良くないという認識が広まり、水、お茶、ジュースなどの健康飲料の消費量が増加しています。

#######

Man: According to a survey of coke consumption, coke consumption has been declining over the past 10 years. Consumption of healthy drinks such as water, tea, and juice is increasing as the perception that coke is not good for health is increasing.
g_text_audio_translate.de:

#######

Man: According to a survey of coke consumption, coke consumption has been declining over the past 10 years. Consumption of healthy drinks such as water, tea, and juice is increasing as the perception that coke is not good for health is increasing.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:

#######

Man: According to a survey of coke consumption, coke consumption has been declining over the past 10 years. Consumption of healthy drinks such as water, tea, and juice is increasing as the perception that coke is not good for health is increasing.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:

#######

Man: According to a survey of coke consumption, coke consumption has been declining over the past 10 years. Consumption of healthy drinks such as water, tea, and juice is increasing as the perception that coke is not good for health is increasing.

#######

Man: According to a survey of coke consumption, coke consumption has been declining over the past 10 years. Consumption of healthy drinks such as water, tea, and juice is increasing as the perception that coke is not good for health is increasing.

#######

Man: According to a survey of coke consumption, coke consumption has been declining over the past 10 years. Consumption of healthy drinks such as water, tea, and juice is increasing as the perception that coke is not good for health is increasing.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 직장인들을 대상으로 하루 평균 일하는 시간을 조사한 결과 30대가 9시간 32분으로 가장 길었으며 그 뒤를 이어 40대, 20대 순이었고 50대가 가장 짧은 것으로 나타났습니다. 또한 앞으로 평균 일하는 시간은 점차 감소할 것으로 예상되었습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Kết quả khảo sát thời gian làm việc trung bình hàng ngày của nhân viên văn phòng cho thấy, thời gian làm việc của độ tuổi 30 là dài nhất với 9 giờ 32 phút, tiếp theo là độ tuổi 40 và độ tuổi 20, độ tuổi 50 là ngắn nhất. Ngoài ra, thời gian làm việc trung bình trong tương lai dự kiến sẽ giảm dần.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: As a result of a survey on average working hours per day for office workers, those in their 30s have the longest at 9 hours and 32 minutes, followed by those in their 40s and those in their 20s, and those in their 50s have the shortest working hours. It is also expected that average working hours will gradually decrease in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Secondo un sondaggio sull'orario di lavoro medio giornaliero degli impiegati, i trentenni hanno il tempo più lungo con 9 ore e 32 minuti, seguiti dai quarantenni e dai ventenni, e dai cinquantenni hanno l'orario di lavoro più breve. Si prevede inoltre che in futuro l'orario medio di lavoro diminuirà gradualmente.

#######

Man: As a result of a survey on average working hours per day for office workers, those in their 30s have the longest at 9 hours and 32 minutes, followed by those in their 40s and those in their 20s, and those in their 50s have the shortest working hours. It is also expected that average working hours will gradually decrease in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : À la suite d'une enquête sur les heures de travail moyennes par jour pour les employés de bureau, ceux dans la trentaine ont le temps le plus long, soit 9 heures et 32 ​​minutes, suivis par ceux dans la quarantaine et ceux dans la vingtaine, et ceux dans la cinquantaine ont les horaires de travail les plus courts. On s’attend également à ce que la durée moyenne du travail diminue progressivement à l’avenir.

#######

Man: As a result of a survey on average working hours per day for office workers, those in their 30s have the longest at 9 hours and 32 minutes, followed by those in their 40s and those in their 20s, and those in their 50s have the shortest working hours. It is also expected that average working hours will gradually decrease in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Como resultado de una encuesta sobre el promedio de horas de trabajo por día para los trabajadores de oficina, los de 30 años tienen el mayor tiempo de trabajo con 9 horas y 32 minutos, seguidos por los de 40 y 20 años, y los de 50 años. las jornadas laborales más cortas. También se espera que la jornada laboral promedio disminuya gradualmente en el futuro.

#######

Man: As a result of a survey on average working hours per day for office workers, those in their 30s have the longest at 9 hours and 32 minutes, followed by those in their 40s and those in their 20s, and those in their 50s have the shortest working hours. It is also expected that average working hours will gradually decrease in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Laki-laki: Berdasarkan survei rata-rata jam kerja per hari pekerja kantoran, pekerja kantoran berusia 30an memiliki jam kerja terlama yaitu 9 jam 32 menit, disusul pekerja berusia 40an dan 20an, serta pekerja berusia 50an yang memiliki jam kerja terlama per hari. jam kerja terpendek. Rata-rata jam kerja juga diperkirakan akan berkurang secara bertahap di masa depan.

#######

It is also expected that average working hours will gradually decrease in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性：会社員の1日の平均労働時間を調査した結果、30代が9時間32分と最も長く、次いで40代、20代となり、50代は9時間32分となっています。最も短い労働時間。また、平均労働時間は今後徐々に短縮されることが予想されます。

#######

It is also expected that average working hours will gradually decrease in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Als Ergebnis einer Umfrage zur durchschnittlichen täglichen Arbeitszeit von Büroangestellten haben die 30-Jährigen mit 9 Stunden und 32 Minuten die längste Arbeitszeit, gefolgt von den 40-Jährigen, den 20-Jährigen und den 50-Jährigen die kürzesten Arbeitszeiten. Es wird auch erwartet, dass die durchschnittliche Arbeitszeit in Zukunft schrittweise sinken wird.

#######

Man: As a result of a survey on average working hours per day for office workers, those in their 30s have the longest at 9 hours and 32 minutes, followed by those in their 40s and those in their 20s, and those in their 50s have the shortest working hours. It is also expected that average working hours will gradually decrease in the future.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 20대 남녀 직장인을 대상으로 퇴근 후 활동에 대해 조사한 결과 남녀 모두 TV를 본다는 응답이 절반 이상을 넘는 것으로 나타났습니다. 다음으로 직장인 남성들은 주로 친구·이성과의 만남을, 여성은 운동을 한다는 응답이 많았습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Kết quả khảo sát các hoạt động sau giờ làm việc của nhân viên văn phòng nam và nữ ở độ tuổi 20 cho thấy, hơn một nửa tổng số nam và nữ đều trả lời rằng họ xem TV. Tiếp theo, đối với nhân viên văn phòng nam thì có nhiều câu trả lời rằng họ chủ yếu gặp gỡ bạn bè và người khác giới, và nhân viên văn phòng nữ là tập thể dục.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: As a result of a survey of male and female office workers in their 20s about their activities after work, more than half of both male and female respondents said they watch TV. Next, there were many responses from male office workers that they mostly meet with friends or people of the opposite sex, while female office workers said that they exercise.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Come risultato di un sondaggio condotto tra impiegati e donne ventenni riguardo alle loro attività dopo il lavoro, più della metà degli intervistati, sia uomini che donne, ha affermato di guardare la TV. Successivamente, ci sono state molte risposte da parte degli impiegati maschi che hanno affermato che si incontrano principalmente con amici o persone del sesso opposto, mentre le impiegate hanno affermato che fanno attività fisica.

#######

Man: As a result of a survey of male and female office workers in their 20s about their activities after work, more than half of both male and female respondents said they watch TV. Next, there were many responses from male office workers that they mostly meet with friends or people of the opposite sex, while female office workers said that they exercise.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : À la suite d'une enquête menée auprès d'employés de bureau, hommes et femmes, dans la vingtaine, sur leurs activités après le travail, plus de la moitié des hommes et des femmes interrogés ont déclaré regarder la télévision. Ensuite, de nombreux employés de bureau masculins ont répondu qu'ils rencontraient principalement des amis ou des personnes du sexe opposé, tandis que les employées de bureau ont déclaré qu'elles faisaient de l'exercice.

#######

g_text_audio_translate.es:

A continuación, hubo muchas respuestas de los oficinistas que se reúnen principalmente con amigos o personas del sexo opuesto, mientras que las oficinistas dijeron que hacen ejercicio.

#######

Berikutnya banyak tanggapan dari para pekerja kantoran laki-laki yang kebanyakan mereka temui dengan teman atau lawan jenis, sedangkan pekerja kantoran perempuan mengatakan mereka berolahraga.

Als nächstes gab es viele Antworten von männlichen Büroangestellten, dass sie sich hauptsächlich mit Freunden oder Menschen des anderen Geschlechts treffen, während weibliche Büroangestellte sagten, dass sie Sport treiben.

Next, there were many responses from male office workers that they mostly meet with friends or people of the opposite sex, while female office workers said that they exercise.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Erkek: 20'li yaşlarındaki erkek ve kadın ofis çalışanlarının iş sonrası faaliyetleriyle ilgili yaptığı anketin sonucunda, hem erkek hem de kadın katılımcıların yarısından fazlası TV izlediklerini söyledi. Daha sonra, erkek ofis çalışanlarından çoğunlukla arkadaşlarıyla veya karşı cinsten kişilerle buluştuklarını belirten çok sayıda yanıt geldi; kadın ofis çalışanları ise egzersiz yaptıklarını söyledi.

#######

Man: As a result of a survey of male and female office workers in their 20s about their activities after work, more than half of both male and female respondents said they watch TV. Next, there were many responses from male office workers that they mostly meet with friends or people of the opposite sex, while female office workers said that they exercise.

explain.vi: Đoạn băng không nhắc đến độ tuổi 30 nên loại đáp án 1 và 4. Đáp án 3 thể hiện đúng tỷ lệ các hoạt động mà nam nữ nhân viên văn phòng thực hiện sau giờ làm việc nên 3 là đáp án đúng.
explain.en: The age of 30 is not mentioned, so 1 and 4 are wrong. 3 shows exactly the percentage of activities that male and female office workers do after work, so the correct answer is 3.
explain.it: L'età di 30 anni non è menzionata, quindi 1 e 4 sono sbagliati. 3 mostra esattamente la percentuale di attività che gli impiegati uomini e donne svolgono dopo il lavoro, quindi la risposta corretta è 3.#######The age of 30 is not mentioned, so 1 and 4 are wrong. 3 shows exactly the percentage of activities that male and female office workers do after work, so the correct answer is 3.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 종이책 판매량을 조사한 결과 일반 서점에서의 판매량이 가장 높았으며 인터넷 서점이 그 뒤를 이었습니다. 대형 마트에서의 종이책 판매량이 가장 적고 판매량 또한 줄어든 것으로 조사되었습니다. 한편, 전자책의 판매량도 점점 증가하는 걸로 나타났습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Kết quả khảo sát doanh số bán sách giấy cho thấy doanh số bán sách ở các hiệu sách thông thường cao nhất, tiếp theo là các hiệu sách Internet. Số lượng sách giấy bán ra tại các siêu thị lớn là ít nhất và số lượng bán ra cũng giảm. Trong khi đó, doanh số bán sách điện tử ngày càng tăng.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: According to a survey of paper book sales, regular bookstores had the highest sales, followed by Internet bookstores. It was found that the sales of paper books at large marts were the smallest and the sales decreased. Meanwhile, sales of e-books are also increasing.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Secondo un sondaggio sulle vendite di libri cartacei, le librerie normali hanno registrato le vendite più elevate, seguite dalle librerie Internet. Si è riscontrato che le vendite di libri cartacei nei grandi mercati erano le più piccole e le vendite sono diminuite. Nel frattempo crescono anche le vendite di e-book.

#######

Man: According to a survey of paper book sales, regular bookstores had the highest sales, followed by Internet bookstores. It was found that the sales of paper books at large marts were the smallest and the sales decreased. Meanwhile, sales of e-books are also increasing.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Selon une enquête sur les ventes de livres papier, les librairies classiques ont réalisé les ventes les plus élevées, suivies par les librairies Internet. Il a été constaté que les ventes de livres papier dans les grands magasins étaient les plus faibles et que les ventes diminuaient. Parallèlement, les ventes de livres électroniques augmentent également.

#######

Man: According to a survey of paper book sales, regular bookstores had the highest sales, followed by Internet bookstores. It was found that the sales of paper books at large marts were the smallest and the sales decreased. Meanwhile, sales of e-books are also increasing.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Según una encuesta sobre las ventas de libros en papel, las librerías habituales tuvieron las mayores ventas, seguidas de las librerías de Internet. Se encontró que las ventas de libros en papel en los grandes mercados fueron las más pequeñas y las ventas disminuyeron. Mientras tanto, las ventas de libros electrónicos también están aumentando.

#######

Man: According to a survey of paper book sales, regular bookstores had the highest sales, followed by Internet bookstores. It was found that the sales of paper books at large marts were the smallest and the sales decreased. Meanwhile, sales of e-books are also increasing.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Menurut survei penjualan buku kertas, toko buku biasa memiliki penjualan tertinggi, diikuti oleh toko buku internet. Ditemukan bahwa penjualan buku kertas di pasar-pasar besar paling kecil dan penjualannya menurun. Sementara itu, penjualan e-book juga meningkat.

#######

Man: According to a survey of paper book sales, regular bookstores had the highest sales, followed by Internet bookstores. It was found that the sales of paper books at large marts were the smallest and the sales decreased. Meanwhile, sales of e-books are also increasing.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性：紙の本の売り上げを調査したところ、最も売り上げが高かったのは一般の書店で、次にインターネット書店が続きました。大型マートでは紙の書籍の販売が最も少なく、売上が減少していることがわかった。一方で、電子書籍の売上も伸びています。

#######

Man: According to a survey of paper book sales, regular bookstores had the highest sales, followed by Internet bookstores. It was found that the sales of paper books at large marts were the smallest and the sales decreased. Meanwhile, sales of e-books are also increasing.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Laut einer Umfrage zum Verkauf gedruckter Bücher erzielten reguläre Buchhandlungen die höchsten Umsätze, gefolgt von Internet-Buchhandlungen. Es wurde festgestellt, dass der Verkauf von Papierbüchern auf großen Märkten am geringsten war und der Umsatz zurückging. Mittlerweile steigen auch die Verkäufe von E-Books.

#######

Man: According to a survey of paper book sales, regular bookstores had the highest sales, followed by Internet bookstores. It was found that the sales of paper books at large marts were the smallest and the sales decreased. Meanwhile, sales of e-books are also increasing.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：根据纸质图书销售情况调查，正规书店的销量最高，其次是网络书店。发现大型卖场纸质书销量最小，销量下降。与此同时，电子书的销量也在不断增长。

#######

Man: According to a survey of paper book sales, regular bookstores had the highest sales, followed by Internet bookstores. It was found that the sales of paper books at large marts were the smallest and the sales decreased. Meanwhile, sales of e-books are also increasing.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：根據紙質圖書銷售情況調查，正規書店的銷量最高，其次是網絡書店。發現大型賣場紙質書銷量最小，銷量下降。與此同時，電子書的銷量也在不斷增長。

#######

Man: According to a survey of paper book sales, regular bookstores had the highest sales, followed by Internet bookstores. It was found that the sales of paper books at large marts were the smallest and the sales decreased. Meanwhile, sales of e-books are also increasing.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Согласно исследованию продаж бумажных книг, самые высокие продажи были в обычных книжных магазинах, за ними следовали книжные интернет-магазины. Выяснилось, что продажи бумажных книг на крупных рынках были наименьшими и продажи снизились. Между тем, продажи электронных книг также растут.

#######

Man: According to a survey of paper book sales, regular bookstores had the highest sales, followed by Internet bookstores. It was found that the sales of paper books at large marts were the smallest and the sales decreased. Meanwhile, sales of e-books are also increasing.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: จากการสำรวจยอดขายหนังสือกระดาษ ร้านหนังสือทั่วไปมียอดขายสูงสุด รองลงมาคือร้านหนังสือทางอินเทอร์เน็ต พบว่ายอดขายหนังสือกระดาษตามมาร์ทขนาดใหญ่มีน้อยที่สุดและยอดขายลดลง ในขณะเดียวกันยอดขายอีบุ๊กก็เพิ่มขึ้นเช่นกัน

#######

Man: According to a survey of paper book sales, regular bookstores had the highest sales, followed by Internet bookstores. It was found that the sales of paper books at large marts were the smallest and the sales decreased. Meanwhile, sales of e-books are also increasing.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: De acordo com uma pesquisa sobre vendas de livros em papel, as livrarias regulares tiveram as vendas mais altas, seguidas pelas livrarias da Internet. Verificou-se que as vendas de livros em papel nos grandes mercados foram as menores e as vendas diminuíram. Enquanto isso, as vendas de e-books também estão aumentando.

#######

Man: According to a survey of paper book sales, regular bookstores had the highest sales, followed by Internet bookstores. It was found that the sales of paper books at large marts were the smallest and the sales decreased. Meanwhile, sales of e-books are also increasing.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: कागज़ की किताबों की बिक्री के एक सर्वेक्षण के अनुसार, नियमित किताबों की दुकानों में सबसे अधिक बिक्री हुई, उसके बाद इंटरनेट किताबों की दुकानों का स्थान रहा। यह पाया गया कि बड़े बाजारों में कागजी किताबों की बिक्री सबसे कम थी और बिक्री कम हो गई। इस बीच ई-बुक्स की बिक्री भी बढ़ रही है।

#######

Man: According to a survey of paper book sales, regular bookstores had the highest sales, followed by Internet bookstores. It was found that the sales of paper books at large marts were the smallest and the sales decreased. Meanwhile, sales of e-books are also increasing.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Basılı kitap satışlarıyla ilgili bir ankete göre, normal kitapçılar en yüksek satışı yaptı, onu internet kitapçıları izledi. Büyük marketlerde kağıt kitap satışlarının en az olduğu ve satışların azaldığı tespit edildi. Bu arada e-kitap satışları da artıyor.

#######

Man: According to a survey of paper book sales, regular bookstores had the highest sales, followed by Internet bookstores. It was found that the sales of paper books at large marts were the smallest and the sales decreased. Meanwhile, sales of e-books are also increasing.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 한국어능력시험 신청자 수에 대한 조사 결과 1997년 한국어능력시험이 처음 시작된 이후 현재까지 신청자가 꾸준히 상승한 것으로 나타났습니다. 또 외국어 능력 시험 중 중국어, 스페인어 능력 시험에 이어 3번째로 신청자 수가 많은 것으로 조사되었습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Theo kết quả của một cuộc khảo sát về số lượng người đăng ký tham gia Kỳ thi năng lực tiếng Hàn, người ta thấy rằng số lượng người đăng ký đã tăng đều đặn kể từ khi Kỳ thi năng lực tiếng Hàn lần đầu tiên ra mắt vào năm 1997. Ngoài ra, trong số các kỳ thi năng lực ngoại ngữ, đây là kỳ thi có số lượng người đăng ký cao thứ ba, xếp sau Kỳ thi năng lực tiếng Trung và Kỳ thi năng lực tiếng Tây Ban Nha.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: As a result of the survey on the number of applicants for the Test of Proficiency in Korean, it was found that the number of applicants has steadily increased since the Test of Proficiency in Korean was first launched in 1997. In addition, among foreign language proficiency tests, it was investigated that the number of applicants of the Test of Proficiency in Korean was the third largest after Chinese and Spanish proficiency tests.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Dall'indagine sul numero di richiedenti per il Test di competenza in coreano, è emerso che il numero di candidati è in costante aumento da quando il Test di competenza in coreano è stato lanciato per la prima volta nel 1997. Inoltre, tra gli stranieri test di competenza linguistica, è stato studiato che il numero di richiedenti del test di competenza in coreano era il terzo più grande dopo i test di competenza di cinese e spagnolo.

#######

Man: As a result of the survey on the number of applicants for the Test of Proficiency in Korean, it was found that the number of applicants has steadily increased since the Test of Proficiency in Korean was first launched in 1997. In addition, among foreign language proficiency tests, it was investigated that the number of applicants of the Test of Proficiency in Korean was the third largest after Chinese and Spanish proficiency tests.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 소득 수준이 높아지면서 여가 활동을 즐기는 사람들이 많아졌는데, 특히 공연을 관람하는 관람객 수가 증가한 것으로 나타났습니다. 30대가 공연을 가장 많이 관람하는 것으로 나타났으며 20대가 그 뒤를 이었습니다. 앞으로도 다양한 공연을 관람하는 관람객 수가 점점 많아질 것으로 예상됩니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Khi mức thu nhập tăng lên, nhiều người thích các hoạt động giải trí hơn, đặc biệt là số lượng khán giả tham dự các buổi biểu diễn. Người ta thấy rằng những người ở độ tuổi 30 xem các buổi biểu diễn nhiều nhất, tiếp theo là những người ở độ tuổi 20. Dự kiến, số lượng khán giả tham dự các buổi biểu diễn khác nhau sẽ tăng lên trong thời gian tới.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: As income levels rise, more people enjoy leisure activities, especially the number of people attending performances. People in their 30s were the most likely to attend performances, followed by people in their 20s. It is expected that the number of spectators to watch various performances will increase in the future.

Le persone sui 30 anni erano le più propense ad assistere agli spettacoli, seguite dai ventenni. Si prevede che in futuro il numero di spettatori che assisteranno ai vari spettacoli aumenterà.

Чаще всего спектакли посещали люди в возрасте 30 лет, за ними следовали люди в возрасте 20 лет. Ожидается, что в будущем количество зрителей, желающих посмотреть различные представления, увеличится.

#######

Man: As income levels rise, more people enjoy leisure activities, especially the number of people attending performances. People in their 30s were the most likely to attend performances, followed by people in their 20s. It is expected that the number of spectators to watch various performances will increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.th:

#######

Man: As income levels rise, more people enjoy leisure activities, especially the number of people attending performances. People in their 30s were the most likely to attend performances, followed by people in their 20s. It is expected that the number of spectators to watch various performances will increase in the future.

Pessoas na faixa dos 30 anos eram as mais propensas a assistir às apresentações, seguidas por pessoas na faixa dos 20 anos. Espera-se que o número de espectadores para assistir a diversas apresentações aumente no futuro.

#######

Man: As income levels rise, more people enjoy leisure activities, especially the number of people attending performances. #######

Gösterilere en çok 30'lu yaşlarındaki kişiler katılırken, onu 20'li yaşlarındaki kişiler izledi. İlerleyen süreçte çeşitli gösterileri izleyecek seyirci sayısının artması bekleniyor.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 최근 선호하는 명절 선물에 대한 설문 조사에 따르면 백화점 상품권이 60%로 사람들이 가장 선호하는 것으로 나타났습니다. 그 다음으로는 과일, 건강식품이 뒤를 이었는데, 이 중 백화점 상품권은 지난해에 비해 판매량이 2배 정도 증가한 것으로 조사됐습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Một cuộc khảo sát gần đây về quà tặng ngày lễ ưa thích cho thấy phiếu quà tặng ở trung tâm thương mại được mọi người ưa thích nhất với tỷ lệ 60%. Tiếp theo là trái cây và thực phẩm tốt cho sức khỏe, và trong số đó, phiếu quà tặng ở trung tâm thương mại có doanh số bán hàng tăng gấp 2 lần so với năm ngoái.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: A recent survey of favorite holiday gifts showed that department store gift certificates are the most favored by people at 60%. It was followed by fruits and health foods, and department store gift certificate sales were found to have doubled compared to last year.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Da un recente sondaggio sui regali natalizi preferiti è emerso che i buoni regalo dei grandi magazzini sono i più apprezzati dalle persone, pari al 60%. È stato seguito da frutta e cibi salutari, e le vendite di buoni regalo nei grandi magazzini sono raddoppiate rispetto allo scorso anno.

#######

Man: A recent survey of favorite holiday gifts showed that department store gift certificates are the most favored by people at 60%. It was followed by fruits and health foods, and department store gift certificate sales were found to have doubled compared to last year.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Une enquête récente sur les cadeaux de Noël préférés a montré que les chèques-cadeaux des grands magasins sont les plus appréciés par les gens, à 60 %. Viennent ensuite les fruits et les aliments santé, et les ventes de chèques-cadeaux dans les grands magasins ont doublé par rapport à l'année dernière.

#######

Man: A recent survey of favorite holiday gifts showed that department store gift certificates are the most favored by people at 60%. It was followed by fruits and health foods, and department store gift certificate sales were found to have doubled compared to last year.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Una encuesta reciente sobre los regalos navideños favoritos mostró que los certificados de regalo de los grandes almacenes son los más preferidos por la gente con un 60%. Le siguieron las frutas y los alimentos saludables, y se descubrió que las ventas de certificados de regalo en grandes almacenes se duplicaron en comparación con el año pasado.

#######

Man: A recent survey of favorite holiday gifts showed that department store gift certificates are the most favored by people at 60%. It was followed by fruits and health foods, and department store gift certificate sales were found to have doubled compared to last year.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Survei terbaru mengenai hadiah liburan favorit menunjukkan bahwa sertifikat hadiah department store adalah yang paling disukai oleh orang-orang sebesar 60%. Diikuti oleh buah-buahan dan makanan kesehatan, dan penjualan sertifikat hadiah di department store ditemukan meningkat dua kali lipat dibandingkan tahun lalu.

#######

Man: A recent survey of favorite holiday gifts showed that department store gift certificates are the most favored by people at 60%. It was followed by fruits and health foods, and department store gift certificate sales were found to have doubled compared to last year.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性: 最近のお気に入りのホリデーギフトに関する調査によると、デパートの商品券が 60% で最も支持されています。次いで果物や健康食品が続き、百貨店商品券の売り上げは前年比２倍となった。

#######

Man: A recent survey of favorite holiday gifts showed that department store gift certificates are the most favored by people at 60%. It was followed by fruits and health foods, and department store gift certificate sales were found to have doubled compared to last year.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Eine kürzlich durchgeführte Umfrage zu den beliebtesten Weihnachtsgeschenken ergab, dass Kaufhaus-Geschenkgutscheine bei den Menschen mit 60 % am beliebtesten sind. Es folgten Obst und Naturkost, und es wurde festgestellt, dass sich die Verkäufe von Geschenkgutscheinen in Kaufhäusern im Vergleich zum Vorjahr verdoppelt haben.

#######

Man: A recent survey of favorite holiday gifts showed that department store gift certificates are the most favored by people at 60%. It was followed by fruits and health foods, and department store gift certificate sales were found to have doubled compared to last year.

#######

#######

#######

g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: पसंदीदा अवकाश उपहारों के एक हालिया सर्वेक्षण से पता चला है कि डिपार्टमेंट स्टोर उपहार प्रमाणपत्र 60% लोगों द्वारा सबसे अधिक पसंद किए जाते हैं। इसके बाद फल और स्वास्थ्य खाद्य पदार्थ थे, और डिपार्टमेंट स्टोर उपहार प्रमाणपत्र की बिक्री पिछले वर्ष की तुलना में दोगुनी पाई गई।

#######

2 and 3 incorrectly reflect the percentage of favorite holiday gifts. 1 correctly shows that department store gift certificates have doubled sales compared to last year. So 1 is the correct answer.
explain.tr:
2 ve 3 en sevilen tatil hediyelerinin yüzdesini yanlış yansıtıyor. Şekil 1, büyük mağaza hediye çeklerinin satışlarının geçen yıla kıyasla iki katına çıktığını doğru bir şekilde gösteriyor. Yani doğru cevap 1'dir.

#######

2 and 3 incorrectly reflect the percentage of favorite holiday gifts. 1 correctly shows that department store gift certificates have doubled sales compared to last year. So 1 is the correct answer.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 최근 직업을 선택할 때 가장 중요하게 생각되는 요인을 조사한 결과 '수입'이라는 응답이 가장 많았으며 ‘적성이나 흥미', ‘안정성’ 등이 그 뒤를 이었습니다. 과거에는 ‘안정성'이 가장 중요했지만 지금은 정신적인 만족감이나 안정성보다는 현재의 경제적인 면을 더 중요하게 생각하는 것으로 조사되었습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Theo kết quả của một cuộc khảo sát gần đây về các yếu tố quan trọng nhất khi chọn một công việc, 'thu nhập' là câu trả lời phổ biến nhất, tiếp theo là 'năng khiếu hoặc sở thích' và 'sự ổn định'. Trước đây, ‘sự ổn định’ là điều quan trọng nhất, nhưng bây giờ, người ta thấy rằng khía cạnh kinh tế quan trọng hơn sự hài lòng về mặt tinh thần hay sự ổn định.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: As a result of a recent survey on the most important factor when choosing a job, 'income' was the most common response, followed by 'aptitude or interest' and 'stability'. In the past, ‘stability’ was the most important, but now it has been investigated that the current economic aspect is more important than mental satisfaction or stability.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Secondo un recente sondaggio sul fattore più importante nella scelta di un lavoro, il "reddito" è stata la risposta più comune, seguita da "attitudine o interesse" e "stabilità". In passato, la “stabilità” era la cosa più importante, ma ora è stato studiato che l’attuale aspetto economico è più importante della soddisfazione mentale o della stabilità.

#######

Dans le passé, la « stabilité » était la chose la plus importante, mais il a maintenant été étudié que l’aspect économique actuel est plus important que la satisfaction mentale ou la stabilité.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 올해 도서를 많이 구입한 연령대와 구입 장소를 조사한 결과, 30대의 도서 구입이 가장 많았고, 지난해 가장 많았던 40대의 도서 구입은 크게 줄었습니다. 구입처를 묻는 질문에는 일반 서점에서 책을 구입하는 사람이 가장 많았지만 앞으로는 그 뒤를 잇고 있는 인터넷 서점의 이용이 더 늘 것으로 예상됩니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Kết quả khảo sát độ tuổi và địa điểm mua nhiều sách trong năm nay cho thấy lượng mua sách của độ tuổi 30 nhiều nhất và lượng mua sách của độ tuổi 40 nhiều nhất năm ngoái đã giảm đáng kể. Về nơi mua sách, nhiều người mua sách ở nhà sách thông thường nhất, xếp thứ hai là nhà sách Internet, nhưng dự kiến trong tương lai số người sử dụng nhà sách Internet sẽ còn tăng.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: According to a survey of the age groups and places where the most books were purchased this year, people in their 30s bought the most books, and those in their 40s who bought the most books last year decreased significantly. When asked where to buy, the majority of people bought books at regular bookstores, but it is expected that the use of online bookstores, which follow regular bookstores, will increase more in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Secondo un sondaggio sulle fasce d'età e sui luoghi in cui è stato acquistato il maggior numero di libri quest'anno, le persone sui 30 anni hanno acquistato più libri, mentre quelle sui 40 anni che hanno acquistato più libri l'anno scorso sono diminuite in modo significativo. Alla domanda su dove acquistare, la maggior parte delle persone ha acquistato libri nelle librerie normali, ma si prevede che l’uso delle librerie online, che seguono le librerie normali, aumenterà maggiormente in futuro.

#######

Man: According to a survey of the age groups and places where the most books were purchased this year, people in their 30s bought the most books, and those in their 40s who bought the most books last year decreased significantly. When asked where to buy, the majority of people bought books at regular bookstores, but it is expected that the use of online bookstores, which follow regular bookstores, will increase more in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Selon une enquête menée auprès des tranches d'âge et des lieux où le plus de livres ont été achetés cette année, les personnes dans la trentaine ont acheté le plus de livres, et celles dans la quarantaine qui ont acheté le plus de livres l'année dernière ont considérablement diminué. Lorsqu'on leur demande où acheter, la majorité des gens ont acheté des livres dans des librairies classiques, mais on s'attend à ce que l'utilisation des librairies en ligne, qui suivent les librairies classiques, augmente davantage à l'avenir.

#######

Man: According to a survey of the age groups and places where the most books were purchased this year, people in their 30s bought the most books, and those in their 40s who bought the most books last year decreased significantly. When asked where to buy, the majority of people bought books at regular bookstores, but it is expected that the use of online bookstores, which follow regular bookstores, will increase more in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Según una encuesta de los grupos de edad y los lugares donde se compraron más libros este año, las personas de 30 años compraron la mayor cantidad de libros, y las de 40 años que compraron la mayor cantidad de libros el año pasado disminuyeron significativamente. Cuando se les preguntó dónde comprar, la mayoría de las personas compraron libros en librerías habituales, pero se espera que el uso de librerías en línea, que siguen a las librerías habituales, aumente más en el futuro.

#######

Man: According to a survey of the age groups and places where the most books were purchased this year, people in their 30s bought the most books, and those in their 40s who bought the most books last year decreased significantly. When asked where to buy, the majority of people bought books at regular bookstores, but it is expected that the use of online bookstores, which follow regular bookstores, will increase more in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.id:

Saat ditanya tempat membeli buku, mayoritas masyarakat membeli buku di toko buku biasa, namun diperkirakan penggunaan toko buku online yang mengikuti toko buku biasa akan semakin meningkat di masa mendatang.

#######

When asked where to buy, the majority of people bought books at regular bookstores, but it is expected that the use of online bookstores, which follow regular bookstores, will increase more in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性：今年最も本を購入した年齢層と場所を調査したところ、昨年最も多く本を購入したのは30代で、昨年最も本を購入した40代が大幅に減少しました。どこで購入するかというと、一般の書店で購入する人が過半数を占めていますが、今後は一般の書店に続くオンライン書店の利用がさらに増えることが予想されます。

#######

g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Laut einer Umfrage zu den Altersgruppen und Orten, an denen in diesem Jahr die meisten Bücher gekauft wurden, kauften die Menschen in den Dreißigern die meisten Bücher, und die Menschen in den Vierzigern, die letztes Jahr die meisten Bücher kauften, gingen deutlich zurück. Auf die Frage, wo man Bücher kaufen kann, antworteten die meisten Menschen, dass sie ihre Bücher in regulären Buchhandlungen kauften. Es wird jedoch erwartet, dass die Nutzung von Online-Buchhandlungen, die den regulären Buchhandlungen folgen, in Zukunft noch stärker zunehmen wird.

#######

Man: According to a survey of the age groups and places where the most books were purchased this year, people in their 30s bought the most books, and those in their 40s who bought the most books last year decreased significantly. When asked where to buy, the majority of people bought books at regular bookstores, but it is expected that the use of online bookstores, which follow regular bookstores, will increase more in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：根据今年买书最多的年龄段和地区的调查，30多岁的人买书最多，去年买书最多的40多岁的人明显减少。当被问到去哪里买书时，大多数人在正规书店购买书籍，但预计继正规书店之后，网上书店的使用量未来将会增加。

#######

g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Согласно опросу возрастных групп и мест, где в этом году было куплено больше всего книг, больше всего книг купили люди в возрасте 30 лет, а количество людей в возрасте 40 лет, купивших больше всего книг в прошлом году, значительно сократилось. g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: आयु समूहों और उन स्थानों के सर्वेक्षण के अनुसार जहां इस वर्ष सबसे अधिक किताबें खरीदी गईं, 30 वर्ष से अधिक उम्र के लोगों ने सबसे अधिक किताबें खरीदीं, और 40 वर्ष से अधिक उम्र के लोगों ने पिछले वर्ष सबसे अधिक किताबें खरीदीं, उनमें काफी कमी आई। यह पूछे जाने पर कि कहां से खरीदें, अधिकांश लोगों ने नियमित बुकस्टोर्स पर किताबें खरीदीं, लेकिन उम्मीद है कि ऑनलाइन बुकस्टोर्स का उपयोग, जो नियमित बुकस्टोर्स का अनुसरण करते हैं, भविष्य में और अधिक बढ़ेगा।

#######

g_text_audio_translate.tr:

Nereden satın alınır diye sorulduğunda büyük bir çoğunluk kitaplarını normal kitapçılardan satın alıyor ancak sıradan kitapçıların ardından gelen online kitapçıların kullanımının da gelecekte daha da artması bekleniyor.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 드라마와 케이팝의 한류 열풍이 한식까지 이어지고 있습니다. 도쿄, 베이징, 타이페이, 뉴욕 등 세계 주요 도시 곳에서 한식당이 가장 인기 있는 외국 식당으로 꼽혔습니다. 한식당에서 중국인들은 갈비와 치킨, 떡볶이, 냉면을 일본인들은 비빔밥, 전, 갈비를 미국인들은 불고기와 비빔밥을 가장 많이 찾는 것으로 나타났습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Làn sóng Hallyu của phim truyền hình và Kpop đang tiếp tục đến tận ẩm thực Hàn Quốc. Ở 4 thành phố lớn trên thế giới là Tokyo, Bắc Kinh, Đài Bắc, New York, nhà hàng Hàn Quốc được chọn là nhà hàng nước ngoài được yêu thích nhất. Tại các nhà hàng Hàn Quốc, người Trung Quốc thích món thịt sườn, gà, bánh gạo và mì lạnh, trong khi người Nhật ưa thích cơm trộn, bánh xèo và thịt sườn, còn người Mỹ lại thích món thịt nướng và cơm trộn.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: The Korean wave of dramas and K-pop is spreading to Korean food. Korean restaurants are ranked as the most popular foreign restaurants in major cities around the world, including Tokyo, Beijing, Taipei and New York. At Korean restaurants, Chinese people prefer galbi, chicken, tteokbokki, and naengmyeon, while Japanese people prefer bibimbap, jeon, and galbi, and Americans prefer bulgogi and bibimbap.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: L'ondata coreana di drammi e K-pop si sta diffondendo nel cibo coreano. I ristoranti coreani sono classificati come i ristoranti stranieri più popolari nelle principali città del mondo, tra cui Tokyo, Pechino, Taipei e New York. Nei ristoranti coreani, i cinesi preferiscono galbi, pollo, tteokbokki e naengmyeon, mentre i giapponesi preferiscono bibimbap, jeon e galbi, e gli americani preferiscono bulgogi e bibimbap.

#######

Man: The Korean wave of dramas and K-pop is spreading to Korean food. At Korean restaurants, Chinese people prefer galbi, chicken, tteokbokki, and naengmyeon, while Japanese people prefer bibimbap, jeon, and galbi, and Americans prefer bulgogi and bibimbap.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : La vague coréenne de drames et de K-pop s'étend à la cuisine coréenne. Les restaurants coréens sont classés parmi les restaurants étrangers les plus populaires dans les grandes villes du monde, notamment Tokyo, Pékin, Taipei et New York. Dans les restaurants coréens, les Chinois préfèrent le galbi, le poulet, le tteokbokki et le naengmyeon, tandis que les Japonais préfèrent le bibimbap, le jeon et le galbi, et les Américains préfèrent le bulgogi et le bibimbap.

В корейских ресторанах китайцы предпочитают гальби, курицу, токпокки и нэнмён, японцы предпочитают пибимпап, чон и гальби, а американцы предпочитают пульгоги и пибимпап.

#######
