general.g_text_audio: 남자: 30대 미혼 여성을 대상으로 결혼을 하지 않는 이유에 대해 조사한 결과 '결혼 비용 부담'이라는 응답이 가장 많았으며 '소득 부족'과 '고용 불안정'이 뒤를 이었습니다. 이렇게 경제적인 불안이 계속된다면 앞으로도 미혼율은 증가할 것으로 보입니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Kết quả khảo sát lý do tại sao một phụ nữ độc thân ở độ tuổi 30 không kết hôn cho thấy nhiều người trả lời rằng 'gánh nặng về chi phí kết hôn', tiếp theo là 'thiếu thu nhập' và 'không ổn định việc làm'. Nếu sự bất an về kinh tế tiếp tục như thế này, tỷ lệ độc thân dự kiến sẽ tăng lên trong tương lai.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: According to a survey of unmarried women in their 30s on why they do not get married, most respondents said "burden of marriage costs", followed by "lack of income" and "employment instability". If such economic instability continues, the unmarried rate is expected to increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Secondo un sondaggio condotto tra donne non sposate trentenni sul motivo per cui non si sposano, la maggior parte degli intervistati ha affermato "il peso dei costi del matrimonio", seguito da "mancanza di reddito" e "instabilità occupazionale". Se tale instabilità economica continua, si prevede che il tasso delle persone non sposate aumenterà in futuro.

#######

Man: According to a survey of unmarried women in their 30s on why they do not get married, most respondents said "burden of marriage costs", followed by "lack of income" and "employment instability". If such economic instability continues, the unmarried rate is expected to increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Selon une enquête menée auprès de femmes célibataires dans la trentaine sur les raisons pour lesquelles elles ne se marient pas, la plupart des personnes interrogées ont évoqué le « fardeau des coûts du mariage », suivi du « manque de revenus » et de « l'instabilité de l'emploi ». Si une telle instabilité économique persiste, le taux de célibat devrait augmenter à l’avenir.

#######

Man: According to a survey of unmarried women in their 30s on why they do not get married, most respondents said "burden of marriage costs", followed by "lack of income" and "employment instability". If such economic instability continues, the unmarried rate is expected to increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Según una encuesta realizada a mujeres solteras de unos 30 años sobre por qué no se casan, la mayoría de los encuestados dijo "carga de los costos del matrimonio", seguido de "falta de ingresos" e "inestabilidad laboral". Si tal inestabilidad económica continúa, se espera que la tasa de solteros aumente en el futuro.

#######

Man: According to a survey of unmarried women in their 30s on why they do not get married, most respondents said "burden of marriage costs", followed by "lack of income" and "employment instability". If such economic instability continues, the unmarried rate is expected to increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Menurut survei terhadap perempuan lajang berusia 30-an tentang alasan mereka tidak menikah, sebagian besar responden mengatakan “beban biaya pernikahan”, diikuti oleh “kurangnya pendapatan” dan “ketidakstabilan lapangan kerja”. Jika ketidakstabilan ekonomi terus berlanjut, angka pengangguran diperkirakan akan meningkat di masa depan.

#######

Man: According to a survey of unmarried women in their 30s on why they do not get married, most respondents said "burden of marriage costs", followed by "lack of income" and "employment instability". If such economic instability continues, the unmarried rate is expected to increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性：30代の未婚女性に結婚しない理由を調査したところ、「結婚費用の負担」が最も多く、次いで「収入がない」「雇用が不安定」となっています。このような経済不安が続けば、今後さらに未婚率が上昇すると予想されます。

#######

Man: According to a survey of unmarried women in their 30s on why they do not get married, most respondents said "burden of marriage costs", followed by "lack of income" and "employment instability". If such economic instability continues, the unmarried rate is expected to increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Laut einer Umfrage unter unverheirateten Frauen in den Dreißigern zu den Gründen, warum sie nicht heiraten, gaben die meisten Befragten „Belastung durch Heiratskosten“ an, gefolgt von „Mangel an Einkommen“ und „Beschäftigungsinstabilität“. Wenn diese wirtschaftliche Instabilität anhält, wird erwartet, dass die Zahl der Unverheirateten in Zukunft steigen wird.

#######

Man: According to a survey of unmarried women in their 30s on why they do not get married, most respondents said "burden of marriage costs", followed by "lack of income" and "employment instability". If such economic instability continues, the unmarried rate is expected to increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：根据对30多岁未婚女性不结婚原因的调查显示，大多数受访者表示“婚姻成本负担”，其次是“收入缺乏”和“就业不稳定”。如果这种经济不稳定持续下去，预计未来未婚率将会上升。

#######

Man: According to a survey of unmarried women in their 30s on why they do not get married, most respondents said "burden of marriage costs", followed by "lack of income" and "employment instability". If such economic instability continues, the unmarried rate is expected to increase in the future.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:

#######

Если такая экономическая нестабильность сохранится, ожидается, что в будущем количество незамужних женщин увеличится.

पुरुष: 30 वर्ष से अधिक उम्र की अविवाहित महिलाओं पर किए गए एक सर्वेक्षण के अनुसार वे शादी क्यों नहीं करतीं, अधिकांश उत्तरदाताओं ने कहा "शादी की लागत का बोझ", इसके बाद "आय की कमी" और "रोजगार अस्थिरता"। यदि ऐसी आर्थिक अस्थिरता जारी रहती है, तो भविष्य में अविवाहित दर बढ़ने की उम्मीद है।

Ekonomik istikrarsızlığın devam etmesi halinde gelecekte evlenmemişlik oranının artması bekleniyor.
